---
title: "COPD AERIS Virome"
author: "Lisa Faye"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
      df_print: paged
      number_sections: TRUE
      keep_md: no
      theme: default
      highlight: kate
      toc: true
      toc_depth: 3 
      toc_float:
         smooth_scroll: true
---

R script supporting the visualizations in the manuscript entitled: "Lung virome dysbiosis in COPD: progressive disease severity is marked by anellome diversification, phage diversity loss, and blooms of virulence factor-encoding Haemophilus phages"

```{r include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r include=TRUE, results="hide"}
packages <- c("cowplot", "decontam", "dplyr", "DT", "ggbreak", "gggenomes", "ggnewscale",   "ggplot2", "ggpubr", "ggtext", "ggtree", "ggvenn", "here", "pals", "patchwork", "phyloseq", "RColorBrewer", "readr", "readxl", "rstatix", "scales", "tidyverse", "vegan", "wesanderson")
lapply(packages, library, character.only = TRUE)
setwd(here())
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
si <- sessioninfo::session_info()
pckgs <- map2(si$packages$package[si$packages$attached == T], 
              si$packages$loadedversion[si$packages$attached == T],
              ~ paste0(.x, " ", .y)) %>% 
  simplify()
print(si$platform$version)
print(paste0("Running under: ", si$platform$os))
print(pckgs)
```

# Prepare data

## Retrieve metadata
```{r}
metadata <- read.delim("data/METADATA/AERIS_virome_metadata.csv", sep=";", header=T)
```

## Generate abundance table

```{r}
# Read the abundance text files and store in a list
abundance_list <- list()
abundance_files <- dir(path = here("data/ABUNDANCES"), pattern = "*.1000_contigs_95-85.reads_coverage_50.txt", full.names = FALSE)
for (i in 1: length(abundance_files)){
  abundance_list[[i]] <- read.delim(here("data/ABUNDANCES", abundance_files[i]))
}

# Create 3 lists: all names, samples only, controls only and mock samples only
names <- sub(pattern = "*.1000_contigs_95-85.reads_coverage_50.txt", "", abundance_files)
samples <- names[grep("AERIS", names)]
controls <- names[grep("PBS", names)]
mock <- names[grep("MOCK", names)]

# Merge abundances in a table by matching headers
abundance_table <- merge(abundance_list[[1]], abundance_list[[2]], by="X", all = TRUE) 
for (i in 1:((length(abundance_list))-2)){
  abundance_table <- merge(abundance_table, abundance_list [[i+2]], by = "X", all = TRUE)
}
colnames(abundance_table)[colnames(abundance_table)=='X'] <- 'CONTIGS'
abundance_table[is.na(abundance_table)] <- 0

rm(i)
rm(abundance_files)
rm(abundance_list)
```

## Generate taxonomy table

### Load Diamond output
```{r}

Diamond <- read.delim(here("data/VIRAL_CLASSIFICATION/DIAMOND", "AERIS.1000_contigs_95-85_diamond_path.tsv"), header = FALSE)
colnames(Diamond) <- c("CONTIGS", "Diamond_path")

Taxonomy_Diamond <- read.csv(here("data/VIRAL_CLASSIFICATION/DIAMOND", "AERIS.1000_contigs_95-85_diamond.csv"), header = TRUE, sep = ",")
colnames(Taxonomy_Diamond) <- c('CONTIGS', 'Diamond_Classification', 'Diamond_Phylum', 'Diamond_Class', 'Diamond_Order', 'Diamond_Family', 'Diamond_Subfamily', 'Diamond_Genus', 'Diamond_Species')

```

### Load geNomad output

```{r}
Taxonomy_Genomad <- read.delim(here("data/VIRAL_CLASSIFICATION/GENOMAD", "All_samples_clustered_95-85_virus_taxonomy.tsv"), header = TRUE)
Taxonomy_Genomad <- Taxonomy_Genomad[!grepl("provirus", Taxonomy_Genomad$CONTIGS),]
colnames(Taxonomy_Genomad) <- c('CONTIGS', 'Genomad_Classification', 'Genomad_Realm', 'Genomad_Kingdom', 'Genomad_Phylum', 'Genomad_Class', 'Genomad_Order', 'Genomad_Family', 'Genomad_Subfamily', 'Genomad_Genus', 'Genomad_Species')

All_contigs <- data.frame("CONTIGS" = abundance_table$CONTIGS)
taxonomy_table <- merge(All_contigs, Diamond, by = "CONTIGS", all = TRUE)
taxonomy_table <- merge(taxonomy_table, Taxonomy_Diamond, by = "CONTIGS", all = TRUE)
taxonomy_table <- merge(taxonomy_table, Taxonomy_Genomad, by = "CONTIGS", all = TRUE)

```


### Identify eukaryotic viruses and phages based on ICTV's host source

```{r}
ICTV_taxa <- read_excel("data/VMR_MSL39.v4_20241106.xlsx", "VMR MSL39", col_types = "text")
ICTV_ranks <- c("Realm","Subrealm","Kingdom","Subkingdom","Phylum","Subphylum","Class","Subclass","Order","Suborder","Family","Subfamily","Genus","Subgenus","Species")

ICTV_phages_taxa <- ICTV_taxa[ICTV_taxa$`Host source` %in% c("bacteria", "bacteria, vertebrates (S)", "bacteria, invertebrates (S)"),]
ICTV_phages_taxa_list <- c()
for (rank in ICTV_ranks){
    ICTV_phages_taxa_list <- unique(c(ICTV_phages_taxa_list, ICTV_phages_taxa[[rank]]))
    }
ICTV_phages_taxa_list <- ICTV_phages_taxa_list[!is.na(ICTV_phages_taxa_list)]

ICTV_eukvir_taxa <- ICTV_taxa[!(ICTV_taxa$`Host source` %in% c("bacteria", "bacteria, vertebrates (S)", "bacteria, invertebrates (S)", "archaea")),] # I also remove the archaea as the Caudoviricetes class contains both archaeal and bacterial viruses
ICTV_eukvir_taxa_list <- c()
for (rank in ICTV_ranks){
    ICTV_eukvir_taxa_list <- unique(c(ICTV_eukvir_taxa_list, ICTV_eukvir_taxa[[rank]]))
}
ICTV_eukvir_taxa_list <- ICTV_eukvir_taxa_list[!is.na(ICTV_eukvir_taxa_list)]

taxa_ambiguous <- intersect(ICTV_phages_taxa_list, ICTV_eukvir_taxa_list)

ICTV_phages_taxa_list <- setdiff(ICTV_phages_taxa_list, taxa_ambiguous)
ICTV_eukvir_taxa_list <- setdiff(ICTV_eukvir_taxa_list, taxa_ambiguous)

annotations_tools <- c("Diamond", "Genomad")

for (tool in annotations_tools){
    classification <- paste0(tool, "_Classification")
    for (rank in ICTV_ranks){
        tool_rank <- paste0(tool, "_", rank)
        if (tool_rank %in% colnames(taxonomy_table)){
            taxonomy_table[,classification] <- ifelse(is.na(taxonomy_table[,classification]) | taxonomy_table[,classification] == "" | taxonomy_table[,classification] == "Root", 
                                                      "Unknown", taxonomy_table[,classification])
            taxonomy_table[,classification] <- ifelse(taxonomy_table[,classification] == "Viruses" & taxonomy_table[,tool_rank] %in% ICTV_phages_taxa_list,
                                                      "Prokaryotic viruses", taxonomy_table[,classification])
            taxonomy_table[,classification] <- ifelse(taxonomy_table[,classification] == "Viruses" & taxonomy_table[,tool_rank] %in% ICTV_eukvir_taxa_list,
                                                      "Eukaryotic viruses", taxonomy_table[,classification])
            }
        }
    taxonomy_table[,classification] <- ifelse(taxonomy_table[,classification] == "Viruses",
                                              "Unclassified viruses", taxonomy_table[,classification])
    }

taxonomy_table$Genomad_Classification <- ifelse(taxonomy_table$Genomad_Classification == "Unclassified", "Unclassified viruses", taxonomy_table$Genomad_Classification)

levels <- c("Classification", "Phylum", "Class", "Order", "Family", "Subfamily", "Genus", "Species")

for (tool in annotations_tools){
    for (i in 1:(length(levels)-1)){
        tool_rank <- paste0(tool, "_", levels[i+1])
        if (tool_rank %in% colnames(taxonomy_table)){
            tool_rank0 <- paste0(tool, "_", levels[i])
            taxonomy_table[,tool_rank] <- ifelse(taxonomy_table[,tool_rank] == "" | is.na(taxonomy_table[,tool_rank]),
                                             gsub("Unclassified Unclassified", "Unclassified", paste("Unclassified", taxonomy_table[,tool_rank0])),
                                             taxonomy_table[,tool_rank])
            taxonomy_table[,tool_rank] <- ifelse(taxonomy_table[,tool_rank] == "Unclassified Unknown", "Unknown", taxonomy_table[,tool_rank])
        }
    }        
}
```

### Insert final classification of contigs in taxonomy table
```{r}
taxonomy_table$Final_Tool <- 1
taxonomy_table$Final_Tool[taxonomy_table$Genomad_Classification == "Prokaryotic viruses" & taxonomy_table$Final_Tool == "1"] <- "Genomad"
taxonomy_table$Final_Tool[taxonomy_table$Diamond_Classification == "Eukaryotic viruses" & taxonomy_table$Genomad_Classification != "Prokaryotic viruses"] <- "Diamond"
taxonomy_table$Final_Tool[taxonomy_table$Genomad_Classification == "Unclassified viruses" & taxonomy_table$Final_Tool == "1"] <- "Genomad"

taxonomy_table$Final_Tool[taxonomy_table$Diamond_Classification == "Bacteria" & taxonomy_table$Final_Tool == "1"] <- "Diamond"
taxonomy_table$Final_Tool[taxonomy_table$Diamond_Classification == "Eukaryota" & taxonomy_table$Final_Tool == "1"] <- "Diamond"
taxonomy_table$Final_Tool[taxonomy_table$Diamond_Classification == "Archaea" & taxonomy_table$Final_Tool == "1"] <- "Diamond"

taxonomy_table$Final_Tool[taxonomy_table$Diamond_Classification == "Unknown" & taxonomy_table$Final_Tool == "1"] <- "Diamond"
taxonomy_table$Final_Tool[taxonomy_table$Genomad_Classification == "Unknown" & taxonomy_table$Final_Tool == "1"] <- "Genomad"

for (i in 1:(length(levels))) {
    final_level <- paste0("Final", "_", levels[i])
    diamond_level <- paste0("Diamond", "_", levels[i])
    genomad_level <- paste0("Genomad", "_", levels[i])
    taxonomy_table[,final_level] <- ifelse(taxonomy_table$Final_Tool == "Diamond", taxonomy_table[,diamond_level],
                                           ifelse(taxonomy_table$Final_Tool == "Genomad", taxonomy_table[,genomad_level], NA))
}

taxonomy_table[taxonomy_table$Final_Tool == "1" & 
                 taxonomy_table$Diamond_Classification == "Prokaryotic viruses" & 
                 taxonomy_table$Genomad_Classification == "Eukaryotic viruses", 
               colnames(taxonomy_table)[grepl("Final_", colnames(taxonomy_table))]] <- "Unclassified viruses"
```

### Insert rhinovirus strains classification
```{r}
rhinovirus_strains <- read.delim(here("data/VIRAL_CLASSIFICATION/RHINO", "rhino.blastn_taxonomy.csv"), header = TRUE, sep = ";")
rhinovirus_strains <-rhinovirus_strains %>%
  rename(CONTIGS = Name, Final_RHV_strain = Strain) %>%
  mutate(Final_RHV_strain = sub("^.", "R", Final_RHV_strain)) %>%
  select(CONTIGS, Final_RHV_strain)

taxonomy_table <- merge(taxonomy_table, rhinovirus_strains, by = "CONTIGS", all = TRUE)
```

### Insert further phage classification based on AAI and % shared genes at family level
```{r}
Nayfach_families <- read.delim(here("data/VIRAL_CLASSIFICATION/PHAGES_AAI_SHARED_GENES", "Nayfach_families_annotated.txt"), header = FALSE, sep = "\t")
colnames(Nayfach_families) <- c("Family_cluster", "Member_family")
Nayfach_families$Member_family[Nayfach_families$Member_family == ""] <- "Reference_not_classified_at_family_level"

Family_clusters_study_contigs <- Nayfach_families[grepl("NODE.*", Nayfach_families$Member_family),]
colnames(Family_clusters_study_contigs) <- c("Family_cluster", "NODE")

Family_clusters_ref <- Nayfach_families[!(grepl("NODE.*", Nayfach_families$Member_family)),]
colnames(Family_clusters_ref) <- c("Family_cluster", "Reference_family")

Nayfach_assigned_families <- Family_clusters_ref %>%
  group_by(Family_cluster, Reference_family) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Family_cluster,
               values_from = count,
               values_fill = 0)

for (col in unique(Family_clusters_ref$Family_cluster)){
  sum_family <- sum(Nayfach_assigned_families[[col]])
  if (Nayfach_assigned_families[Nayfach_assigned_families$Reference_family == "Reference_not_classified_at_family_level", col] != sum_family) 
  {
    Nayfach_assigned_families[Nayfach_assigned_families$Reference_family == "Reference_not_classified_at_family_level", col] <- 0
  }
}

Taxonomy_Nayfach_families <- Nayfach_assigned_families %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -Reference_family,
               names_to = "Family_cluster",
               values_to = "count") %>%
  group_by(Family_cluster) %>%
  filter(count == max(count)) %>%
  slice_head(n=1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(Family_cluster, Reference_family)

Taxonomy_Nayfach_families <- merge(Family_clusters_study_contigs, Taxonomy_Nayfach_families, by = "Family_cluster", all = TRUE)
Taxonomy_Nayfach_families$Reference_family[is.na(Taxonomy_Nayfach_families$Reference_family)] <- "No_reference_in_cluster"
Taxonomy_Nayfach_families <- Taxonomy_Nayfach_families[,c(2,1,3)]
colnames(Taxonomy_Nayfach_families) <- c("CONTIGS", "Nayfach_family_cluster", "Nayfach_family_reference")
```

### Insert further phage classification based on AAI and % shared genes at genus level
```{r}
Nayfach_genera <- read.delim(here("data/VIRAL_CLASSIFICATION/PHAGES_AAI_SHARED_GENES", "Nayfach_genera_annotated.txt"), header = FALSE, sep = "\t")
colnames(Nayfach_genera) <- c("Genus_cluster", "Member_genus")
Nayfach_genera$Member_genus[Nayfach_genera$Member_genus == ""] <- "Reference_not_classified_at_genus_level"

Genus_clusters_study_contigs <- Nayfach_genera[grepl("NODE.*", Nayfach_genera$Member_genus),]
colnames(Genus_clusters_study_contigs) <- c("Genus_cluster", "NODE")

Genus_clusters_ref <- Nayfach_genera[!(grepl("NODE.*", Nayfach_genera$Member_genus)),]
colnames(Genus_clusters_ref) <- c("Genus_cluster", "Reference_genus")

Nayfach_assigned_genera <- Genus_clusters_ref %>%
  group_by(Genus_cluster, Reference_genus) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Genus_cluster,
              values_from = count,
              values_fill = 0)

for (col in unique(Genus_clusters_ref$Genus_cluster)){
  sum_genus <- sum(Nayfach_assigned_genera[[col]])
  if (Nayfach_assigned_genera[Nayfach_assigned_genera$Reference_genus == "Reference_not_classified_at_genus_level", col] != sum_genus){
    Nayfach_assigned_genera[Nayfach_assigned_genera$Reference_genus == "Reference_not_classified_at_genus_level", col] <- 0
  }
}

Taxonomy_Nayfach_genera <- Nayfach_assigned_genera %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -Reference_genus,
               names_to = "Genus_cluster",
               values_to = "count") %>%
  group_by(Genus_cluster) %>%
  filter(count == max(count)) %>%
  slice_head(n=1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(Genus_cluster, Reference_genus)

Taxonomy_Nayfach_genera <- merge(Genus_clusters_study_contigs, Taxonomy_Nayfach_genera, by = "Genus_cluster", all = TRUE)
Taxonomy_Nayfach_genera$Reference_genus[is.na(Taxonomy_Nayfach_genera$Reference_genus)] <- "No_reference_in_cluster"
Taxonomy_Nayfach_genera <- Taxonomy_Nayfach_genera[,c(2,1,3)]
colnames(Taxonomy_Nayfach_genera) <- c("CONTIGS", "Nayfach_genus_cluster", "Nayfach_genus_reference")

Taxonomy_Nayfach <- merge(Taxonomy_Nayfach_families, Taxonomy_Nayfach_genera, by = "CONTIGS", all = TRUE)
rm(Taxonomy_Nayfach_families)
rm(Taxonomy_Nayfach_genera)

taxonomy_table <- left_join(taxonomy_table, Taxonomy_Nayfach, by = "CONTIGS")
```

### Change the final classification of phages with geNomad/AAI conflicts to AAI taxonomy (manually)
```{r}
inoviridae_classification <- taxonomy_table %>%
  filter(Nayfach_family_reference == "Protoinoviridae") %>%
  select(all_of(paste0("Final_", levels))) %>%
  slice(1)

for (i in colnames(inoviridae_classification)) {
  taxonomy_table[[i]] <- ifelse(
    taxonomy_table$Nayfach_family_reference == "Vespertilinoviridae" & !is.na(taxonomy_table$Nayfach_family_reference),
    inoviridae_classification[[i]],
    taxonomy_table[[i]])
}

taxonomy_table$Final_Tool[taxonomy_table$Nayfach_family_reference == "Vespertilinoviridae"] <- "Nayfach"
taxonomy_table$Final_viral[taxonomy_table$Nayfach_family_reference == "Vespertilinoviridae"] <- "Good-quality phages"
```

### Paste geNomad taxa + AAI cluster # + reference taxa (if existing)
```{r}
taxonomy_table$Final_FamilyN <-ifelse(
  taxonomy_table$Nayfach_family_reference %in% c("No_reference_in_cluster", "Reference_not_classified_at_family_level"),
  paste0(taxonomy_table$Final_Family, ":", taxonomy_table$Nayfach_family_cluster),
  taxonomy_table$Final_Family)

taxonomy_table$Final_FamilyN <-ifelse(
  !(taxonomy_table$Nayfach_family_reference %in% c("No_reference_in_cluster", "Reference_not_classified_at_family_level", NA)),
  paste0(taxonomy_table$Final_Family, ":", taxonomy_table$Nayfach_family_cluster, "_", taxonomy_table$Nayfach_family_reference),
  taxonomy_table$Final_FamilyN)

taxonomy_table$Final_GenusN <-ifelse(
  taxonomy_table$Nayfach_genus_reference %in% c("No_reference_in_cluster", "Reference_not_classified_at_genus_level"),
  paste0(taxonomy_table$Final_Genus, ":", taxonomy_table$Nayfach_genus_cluster),
  taxonomy_table$Final_Genus)

taxonomy_table$Final_GenusN <-ifelse(
  !(taxonomy_table$Nayfach_genus_reference %in% c("No_reference_in_cluster", "Reference_not_classified_at_genus_level", NA)),
  paste0(taxonomy_table$Final_Genus, ":", taxonomy_table$Nayfach_genus_cluster, "_", taxonomy_table$Nayfach_genus_reference),
  taxonomy_table$Final_GenusN)
```

## Generate Mastertable

### Load CheckV ouput
```{r}
CheckV_output <- read.delim(here("data/PHAGE_ANNOTATION/COMPLETENESS","quality_summary_R.tsv"), header = TRUE)
colnames(CheckV_output) <- c('CONTIGS', 'provirus', 'proviral length', 'total_genes', 'viral_genes', 'checkv_quality', 'completeness')
```

### Load geNomad ouput
```{r}
geNomad_output <- read.delim(here("data/VIRAL_CLASSIFICATION/GENOMAD", "All_samples_clustered_95-85_virus_scores.tsv"), header = TRUE)
colnames(geNomad_output) <- c('CONTIGS', 'length', 'topology', 'coordinates', 'n_genes', 'genetic_code', 'virus_score', 'fdr', 'n_hallmarks', 'marker_enrichment')
geNomad_output$CONTIGS <- gsub("\\|provirus_.*", "", geNomad_output$CONTIGS)
  
viromics_tools_table <- merge(CheckV_output, geNomad_output, by = "CONTIGS", all = TRUE)
```

### Create a Mastertable merging abundance table, taxonomy table, and viromics tools 
```{r}
Mastertable <- merge(abundance_table, taxonomy_table[, grepl("CONTIGS|^Final_", colnames(taxonomy_table))], by = "CONTIGS", all = TRUE)
Mastertable <- merge(Mastertable, viromics_tools_table, by = "CONTIGS", all = TRUE)
```

## Remove contaminants

### Remove contaminants identified with decontam
```{r}
# Format the abundance table for the phyloseq object
OTU <- abundance_table
OTU[is.na(OTU)] <- 0
row.names(OTU) <- OTU$CONTIGS
OTU$CONTIGS <- NULL
OTU <- as.matrix(OTU)

# Format the taxonomy table for the phyloseq object
TAX <- taxonomy_table
row.names(TAX) <- TAX$CONTIGS
TAX$CONTIGS <- NULL
TAX <- as.matrix(TAX)

OTU <- otu_table(OTU, taxa_are_rows=T)
TAX <- tax_table(TAX)
METADATA <- sample_data(transform(metadata, row.names = AERISVIR_Internal_ID))

AERIS <- phyloseq(OTU, TAX, METADATA)

# Plot the number of mapped reads for all samples and controls
decontam <- as.data.frame(sample_data(AERIS)) 
decontam$LibrarySize <- sample_sums(AERIS)
decontam <- decontam[order(decontam$LibrarySize),]
decontam$Index <- seq(nrow(decontam))
ggplot(data=decontam, aes(x=Index, y=LibrarySize, color=Sample_or_Control)) + geom_point() + scale_y_log10() 

# Run decontam
sample_data(AERIS)$is.neg <- sample_data(AERIS)$Sample_or_Control == "Control"
contamdf.prev <- isContaminant(AERIS, method="prevalence", neg="is.neg", threshold=0.1)

```

Number of contaminating contigs:
``` {r}
table(contamdf.prev$contaminant)
```

```{r}
# Make phyloseq object of presence-absence in negative controls and true samples
AERIS.pa <- transform_sample_counts(AERIS, function(abund) 1*(abund>0))
AERIS.pa.neg <- prune_samples(sample_data(AERIS.pa)$Sample_or_Control == "Control", AERIS.pa)
AERIS.pa.pos <- prune_samples(sample_data(AERIS.pa)$Sample_or_Control %in% c("Sample", "Mock"), AERIS.pa)

# Make data.frame of prevalence in positive and negative samples
decontam.pa <- data.frame(pa.pos=taxa_sums(AERIS.pa.pos), pa.neg=taxa_sums(AERIS.pa.neg),
                    contaminant=contamdf.prev$contaminant)
ggplot(data=decontam.pa, aes(x=pa.neg, y=pa.pos, color=contaminant)) + geom_point() +
    xlab("Prevalence (Negative Controls)") + ylab("Prevalence (True Samples)")

# Calculate the prevalence and the abundances of reads in the samples, controls and mock
Prevalence_abundance <- abundance_table %>%
  mutate(PrevalenceSamples = rowSums(select(., all_of(samples)) != 0),
         PrevalenceControls = rowSums(select(., all_of(controls)) != 0),
         PrevalenceMock = rowSums(select(., all_of(mock)) != 0),
         AbundanceSamples = rowSums(select(., all_of(samples))),
         AbundanceControls = rowSums(select(., all_of(controls))),
         AbundanceMock = rowSums(select(., all_of(mock)))) %>%
  select(CONTIGS, PrevalenceSamples, PrevalenceControls, PrevalenceMock,
         AbundanceSamples, AbundanceControls, AbundanceMock)

rownames(Prevalence_abundance) <- Prevalence_abundance$CONTIGS

contamdf.prev <- merge(contamdf.prev, Prevalence_abundance, by.x = 0, by.y = "CONTIGS", all = TRUE)
colnames(contamdf.prev)[1] <- "CONTIGS"

# Remove contaminants from Mastertable
Mastertable <- merge(Mastertable, contamdf.prev, by = "CONTIGS", all = TRUE)

Mastertable_decontam <- Mastertable[Mastertable$contaminant == "FALSE",]

```

### Remove contigs of human origin
```{r}
contigs_mapping_to_hg38 <- readLines(here("data/VIRAL_CLASSIFICATION/BLASTN_AGAINST_HG38", "AERIS.blastn_against_hg38.txt"))
Mastertable_no_human <- Mastertable_decontam %>%
  filter(!(CONTIGS %in% contigs_mapping_to_hg38))
```

```{r}
# Identify GQ phages
Mastertable_no_human$Final_viral[Mastertable_no_human$Final_Classification == "Eukaryotic viruses"] <- "Eukaryotic viruses"
Mastertable_no_human$Final_viral[Mastertable_no_human$Final_Classification == "Prokaryotic viruses" & Mastertable_no_human$checkv_quality == "Low-quality"] <- "Low-quality phages"
Mastertable_no_human$Final_viral[Mastertable_no_human$Final_Classification == "Unclassified viruses" & Mastertable_no_human$checkv_quality == "Low-quality"] <- "Low-quality unclassified viruses"
Mastertable_no_human$Final_viral[Mastertable_no_human$Final_Classification == "Prokaryotic viruses" & Mastertable_no_human$checkv_quality %in% c("Complete","High-quality","Medium-quality")] <- "Good-quality phages"
Mastertable_no_human$Final_viral[Mastertable_no_human$Final_Classification == "Unclassified viruses" & Mastertable_no_human$checkv_quality %in% c("Complete","High-quality","Medium-quality")] <- "Good-quality unclassified viruses"
```

### Remove contigs from negative and positive (mock) controls
```{r}
Mastertable_clean <- Mastertable_no_human[!(Mastertable_no_human$PrevalenceControls > 0 
                                                & Mastertable_no_human$PrevalenceMock == 0 
                                                & Mastertable_no_human$PrevalenceSamples == 0),]

Mastertable_clean <- Mastertable_clean[!(Mastertable_clean$PrevalenceMock > 0
                                                    & Mastertable_clean$PrevalenceSamples == 0),]
```

Viral contigs distribution in AERIS dataset:
```{r}
table(Mastertable_clean$Final_viral)
```

### Remove non-viral contigs

```{r}
Mastertable_viral <- Mastertable_clean %>% 
  filter(Final_viral %in% c("Eukaryotic viruses", "Good-quality phages", "Good-quality unclassified viruses"))
```

## Add phage host prediction and lifetyle

### Load iPhoP output
```{r}
iphop_output <- read.delim(here("data/PHAGE_ANNOTATION/HOST_PREDICTION", "Host_prediction_to_genus_m90.csv"), header = TRUE, sep = ",")

iphop_output <- iphop_output %>%
  mutate(row_id = row_number()) %>% 
  separate_rows(List.of.methods, sep = " ") %>%
  separate(List.of.methods, into = c("Method", "Score"), sep = ";") %>%
  mutate(Score = as.numeric(Score)) %>%
  group_by(row_id) %>%
  mutate(pair_id = row_number()) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = pair_id,
    values_from = c(Method, Score),
    names_glue = "{.value}.{pair_id}") %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-row_id) %>%
  mutate(Sum.Score = rowSums(across(starts_with("Score.")), na.rm = TRUE))

iphop_output <- iphop_output %>%
  rename(CONTIGS = Virus) %>%
  mutate(Host.genus = gsub("[dpcofg]__", "", Host.genus)) %>%
  separate(Host.genus, c("Host_Domain","Host_Phylum", "Host_Class", "Host_Order", "Host_Family", "Host_Genus"), sep = ";") %>%
  mutate(Host_Genus = gsub("_[A-Za-z]$", "", Host_Genus)) %>%
  group_by(CONTIGS) %>%
  arrange(desc(Confidence.score), desc(Sum.Score), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(CONTIGS, matches("^Host_"))

Mastertable_viral <- left_join(Mastertable_viral, iphop_output, by = "CONTIGS")
```

### Load replidec output
```{r}
replidec_output <- read.delim(here("data/PHAGE_ANNOTATION/PHAGE_LIFESTYLE", "BC_predict.summary"), header = TRUE)
replidec_output <- replidec_output %>%
  rename(CONTIGS = sample_name, replidec_lifestyle = final_label) %>%
  select(CONTIGS, replidec_lifestyle)

Mastertable_viral <- left_join(Mastertable_viral, replidec_output, by = "CONTIGS")

# Add length (if not already present)
Mastertable_viral$length[is.na(Mastertable_viral$length)] <- gsub('.*_length_','',Mastertable_viral$CONTIGS[is.na(Mastertable_viral$length)])
Mastertable_viral$length <- as.numeric(gsub("_cov_.*","",Mastertable_viral$length))
```

## Add anellovirus genera from phylogenetic analysis

```{r}

my_anello_seq_2kbfiltered <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(Final_Family == "Anelloviridae") %>%
  filter(length >= 2000) %>%
  pull(CONTIGS)

tree_anello <- read.tree(here("data/VIRAL_CLASSIFICATION/ANELLO", "anello.treefile"))
anello_references <- read.csv(here("data/VIRAL_CLASSIFICATION/ANELLO", "Modha_allsequence_data.csv"), header = TRUE)

tree_anello$tip.label <- ifelse(
  grepl("AERISVIR", tree_anello$tip.label),
  sub("^.*\\|", "", tree_anello$tip.label),
  tree_anello$tip.label)

tree_anello$tip.label <- ifelse(
  !grepl("AERISVIR", tree_anello$tip.label),
  sub("_length_.*", "", tree_anello$tip.label),
  tree_anello$tip.label)

dist_matrix <- cophenetic(tree_anello)

closest_refs <- sapply(my_anello_seq_2kbfiltered, function(seq) {
    dists <- dist_matrix[seq, ]
    dists_ref <- dists[names(dists) %in% anello_references$label]
    names(which.min(dists_ref))})

assigned_clades <- anello_references %>%
  filter(label %in% closest_refs) %>%
  select(label, Clade)

assigned_anello <- data.frame(CONTIGS = my_anello_seq_2kbfiltered, ClosestRef = closest_refs) %>%
  left_join(assigned_clades, by = c("ClosestRef" = "label"))

assigned_anello <- assigned_anello %>%
  mutate(Clade = str_replace(Clade, "^.", ~ toupper(.x))) %>%
  mutate(Clade = paste0(Clade, "torquevirus"))

Mastertable_viral$Final_GenusN[Mastertable_viral$Final_Family == "Anelloviridae"] <- NA

Mastertable_viral <- merge(Mastertable_viral, (assigned_anello %>% select(CONTIGS, Clade)), by = "CONTIGS", all = TRUE)

Mastertable_viral <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  mutate(Final_GenusN = if_else(Final_Family == "Anelloviridae", Clade,
                               Final_GenusN)) %>%
  mutate(Final_GenusN = if_else(Final_Family == "Anelloviridae" & is.na(Final_GenusN), "Unclassified Anelloviridae",
                               Final_GenusN)) %>%
  select(-Clade)

Mastertable_viral <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  mutate(Final_GenusN = if_else(Final_GenusN == "Unclassified Anelloviridae" & !Final_Genus == "Unclassified Anelloviridae", Final_Genus,
                                Final_GenusN))
```

## Load 16S Mastertable
```{r}
SRAruntable <- read.csv(here("data/BACTERIOME","SraRunTable.csv"), header = TRUE, sep = ";")
SRAruntable <- SRAruntable %>%
  select(Run, Collection_Date, subjectID) %>%
  mutate(Collection_Date = as.Date(Collection_Date),
         subjectID = as.character(subjectID))

Mastertable_bact <- read.csv(here("data/BACTERIOME", "mastertable_bactDADA2.csv"), header = TRUE, sep = ",")
colnames(Mastertable_bact)[colnames(Mastertable_bact) == "X"] <- "ASV_ID"

diversity_bact <- read.csv(here("data/BACTERIOME","diversity_table_bact.csv"), header = TRUE, sep = ",")
diversity_bact <- merge(diversity_bact, SRAruntable, by.x = "Samples", by.y = "Run", all = TRUE)
diversity_bact <- diversity_bact %>%
  rename(Date_Visits = Collection_Date, PID = subjectID) %>%
  mutate(Date_Visits = as.character(Date_Visits))
```


## Generate counts table

```{r}
Raw_reads <- read.delim(here("data/COUNTS", "AERIS.number_raw_reads.txt"), header = FALSE, sep = "\t", col.names = c("Samples", "Raw_reads"))
Trimmed_reads <- read.delim(here("data/COUNTS", "AERIS.number_trimmed_reads.txt"), header = FALSE, sep = "\t", col.names = c("Samples", "Trimmed_reads"))
Mapped_reads <- data.frame(Samples = colnames(abundance_table[,-1]), Mapped_reads = as.vector(colSums(abundance_table[,-1], na.rm = TRUE)))
Contigs <- data.frame(Samples = colnames(abundance_table[,-1]), Contigs = as.vector(colSums(abundance_table != 0, na.rm = TRUE)[-1]))
Mapped_viral_reads <- Mastertable_no_human %>% 
  filter(!is.na(Final_viral)) %>%
  select(all_of(names)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), sum, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%  
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "Samples", values_to = "Mapped_viral_reads")
Viral_contigs <- Mastertable_no_human %>% 
  filter(!is.na(Final_viral)) %>%
  select(all_of(names)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum( . > 0, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%  
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "Samples", values_to = "Viral_contigs")
GQ_Mapped_viral_reads <- Mastertable_no_human %>% 
  filter(Final_viral %in% c("Eukaryotic viruses", "Good-quality phages", "Good-quality unclassified viruses")) %>%
  select(all_of(names)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), sum, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%  
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "Samples", values_to = "GQ_Mapped_viral_reads")
GQ_Viral_contigs <- Mastertable_no_human %>% 
  filter(Final_viral %in% c("Eukaryotic viruses", "Good-quality phages", "Good-quality unclassified viruses")) %>%
  select(all_of(names)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum( . > 0, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%  
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "Samples", values_to = "GQ_Viral_contigs")
Mapped_euk_vir_reads <- Mastertable_viral %>% 
  filter(Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  select(all_of(names)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), sum, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%  
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "Samples", values_to = "Mapped_euk_vir_reads")
Euk_vir_contigs <- Mastertable_viral %>% 
  filter(Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  select(all_of(names)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum( . > 0, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%  
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "Samples", values_to = "Euk_vir_contigs")
Mapped_GQ_phage_reads <- Mastertable_viral %>% 
  filter(!Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  select(all_of(names)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), sum, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%  
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "Samples", values_to = "Mapped_GQ_phage_reads")
GQ_phage_contigs <- Mastertable_viral %>% 
  filter(!Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  select(all_of(names)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum( . > 0, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%  
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "Samples", values_to = "GQ_phage_contigs")


COUNTS <- merge(Raw_reads, Trimmed_reads, by = "Samples")
COUNTS$Percentage_trimmed <- (COUNTS$Trimmed_reads/COUNTS$Raw_reads)*100
COUNTS <- merge(COUNTS, Mapped_reads, by = "Samples")
COUNTS$Percentage_mapped <- (COUNTS$Mapped_reads/COUNTS$Raw_reads)*100
COUNTS <- merge(COUNTS, Contigs, by = "Samples")
COUNTS <- merge(COUNTS, Mapped_viral_reads, by = "Samples")
COUNTS$Percentage_mapped_viral <- (COUNTS$Mapped_viral_reads/COUNTS$Raw_reads)*100
COUNTS <- merge(COUNTS, Viral_contigs, by = "Samples")
COUNTS <- merge(COUNTS, GQ_Mapped_viral_reads, by = "Samples")
COUNTS$Percentage_GQ_mapped_viral <- (COUNTS$GQ_Mapped_viral_reads/COUNTS$Raw_reads)*100
COUNTS <- merge(COUNTS, GQ_Viral_contigs, by = "Samples")
COUNTS <- merge(COUNTS, Mapped_euk_vir_reads, by = "Samples")
COUNTS <- COUNTS %>%
  mutate(Percentage_mapped_euk_vir = ifelse(GQ_Mapped_viral_reads == 0, NA,
                  (Mapped_euk_vir_reads / GQ_Mapped_viral_reads) * 100))
COUNTS <- merge(COUNTS, Euk_vir_contigs, by = "Samples")
COUNTS <- merge(COUNTS, Mapped_GQ_phage_reads, by = "Samples")
COUNTS <- COUNTS %>%
  mutate(Percentage_mapped_GQ_phage = ifelse(GQ_Mapped_viral_reads == 0, NA,
                                            (Mapped_GQ_phage_reads / GQ_Mapped_viral_reads) * 100))
COUNTS <- merge(COUNTS, GQ_phage_contigs, by = "Samples")

```

Summary count statistics on all samples:
```{r}
# Min, max and median for all samples
summary(COUNTS[c("Samples","Raw_reads", "Trimmed_reads", "Mapped_reads", "GQ_Mapped_viral_reads")] %>% filter(grepl("AERIS", Samples)))

# Min, max and median for stable state samples
summary(COUNTS[c("Samples","Raw_reads", "Trimmed_reads", "Mapped_reads", "GQ_Mapped_viral_reads")] %>% filter(grepl("AERIS", metadata$AERISVIR_Internal_ID[])))


# Min, max and median for all positive controls
summary(COUNTS[c("Samples","Raw_reads", "Trimmed_reads", "Mapped_reads", "GQ_Mapped_viral_reads")] %>% filter(grepl("MOCK", Samples)))

# Min, max and median for all negative controls
summary(COUNTS[c("Samples","Raw_reads", "Trimmed_reads", "Mapped_reads", "GQ_Mapped_viral_reads")] %>% filter(grepl("PBS", Samples)))
```

# Color palettes

Colors for viral families:
```{r echo=FALSE}
MyColorsViralFamilies <- c("Adenoviridae" = "#FDB462",
                           "Anelloviridae" = "#FFFFB3",
                           "Circoviridae" = "#CAB2D6",
                           "Coronaviridae" = "#1B9E77",
                           "Genomoviridae" = "#FCCDE5",
                           "Metaviridae" = "#e0cd54",
                           "Orthoherpesviridae" = "#9c1e41",
                           "Orthomyxoviridae" = "#fffa4a",
                           "Papillomaviridae" = "#3c81d6",
                           "Paramyxoviridae" = "#B10DA1",
                           "Parvoviridae" = "#ccab9e",
                           "Picornaviridae" = "#ff3b3b",
                           "Pneumoviridae" = "#2748a0",
                           "Polyomaviridae" = "#FB6496",
                           "Redondoviridae" = "#99ffe5",
                           "Sedoreoviridae" = "#afafaf",
                           "Unclassified Arfiviricetes" = "#4fdf66",
                           "Unclassified Crassvirales" = "#ffd8c3",
                           "Unclassified Cressdnaviricota" = "#b7ffa0",
                           "Inoviridae" = "#FC8D62",
                           "Microviridae" = "#CCEBC5",
                           "Rountreeviridae" = "#8ac1ff",
                           "Schitoviridae" = "#8DA0CB",
                           "Unclassified Caudoviricetes" = "#80B1D3",
                           "Unclassified viruses" = "#BC80BD")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.width=9, fig.height=4.5, fig.align='center'}
pal.bands(MyColorsViralFamilies, main = "MyColorsViralFamilies")
```

Colors for common respiratory pathogens:
```{r echo=FALSE}
MyColorsRespiPathoSpecies <- c("Betacoronavirus 1" = "#8DD3C7",
                               "Human coronavirus OC43" = "#8DD3C7",
                               "Human coronavirus HKU1" = "#66C2A5",
                               "Human coronavirus 229E" = "#1ca87e",
                               "Human coronavirus NL63" = "#26bf92",
                               "Betainfluenzavirus influenzae"= "#fffa4a",
                               "Influenza B virus" = "#fffa4a",
                               "Influenza A virus" = "#ece520",
                               "Human mastadenovirus B" = "#FDB462",
                               "Adenovirus" = "#FDB462",
                               "Metapneumovirus hominis" = "#2748a0",
                               "Human metapneumovirus" = "#2748a0",
                               "Orthopneumovirus hominis" = "#2a65af",
                               "Unclassified Orthopneumovirus" = "#5C89C1",
                               "Human respiratory syncytial virus" = "#2a65af",
                               "Orthorubulavirus hominis" = "#B10DA1",
                               "Human parainfluenza virus 4" = "#B10DA1",
                               "Respirovirus pneumoniae" = "#d921c8",
                               "Human parainfluenza virus 3" = "#d921c8",
                               "Human parainfluenza virus 2" = "#e33dd4",
                               "Human parainfluenza virus 1" = "#a60d99",
                               "Unclassified Bocaparvovirus" = "#ccab9e",
                               "Human bocavirus" = "#ccab9e",
                               "Rhinovirus A" = "#ff3030",
                               "Rhinovirus B" = "#fc6060",
                               "Rhinovirus C" = "#d91a1a",
                               "Rhinovirus + Enterovirus" = "#ff3030")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=4.5, fig.align='center'}
pal.bands(MyColorsRespiPathoSpecies, main = "MyColorsRespiPathoSpecies")
```


Colors for rhinovirus strains:
```{r echo=FALSE}
rhinoA <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(9, "Reds")[3:8])(9)
rhinoB <- brewer.pal(n=9, name = "Greys")[c(4,7)]
rhinoC <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(9, "Purples")[4:9])(5)

rhinoA_names <- Mastertable_viral %>% filter(Final_Species == "Rhinovirus A") %>% 
  pull(Final_RHV_strain) %>% unique()
rhinoB_names <- Mastertable_viral %>% filter(Final_Species == "Rhinovirus B") %>% 
  pull(Final_RHV_strain) %>% unique()
rhinoC_names <- Mastertable_viral %>% filter(Final_Species == "Rhinovirus C") %>% 
  pull(Final_RHV_strain) %>% unique()

rhinoA <- setNames(rhinoA, rhinoA_names)
rhinoB <- setNames(rhinoB, rhinoB_names)
rhinoC <- setNames(rhinoC, rhinoC_names)

MyColorsRhino <- c(rhinoA, rhinoB, rhinoC)
```

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.width=6, fig.height=3.5, fig.align='center'}
pal.bands(MyColorsRhino, main = "MyColorsRhino")
```

Colors for phage classes:
```{r echo=FALSE}
MyColorsPhageClasses <- c("Caudoviricetes" = "#80B1D3",
                          "Faserviricetes" = "#FC8D62",
                          "Malgrandaviricetes" = "#CCEBC5",
                          "Unclassified viruses" = "#BC80BD")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.width=7, fig.height=4, fig.align='center'}
pal.bands(MyColorsPhageClasses, main = "MyColorsPhageClasses")
```

Colors for family-level phage clusters:
```{r echo=FALSE}
palette_blue <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(n=3, name = "Blues"))(30)

unclassified_caudo <- grep("^Unclassified Caudoviricetes", unique(Mastertable_viral$Final_FamilyN), value = TRUE)
unclassified_caudo_colors <- setNames(palette_blue[seq_along(unclassified_caudo)], unclassified_caudo)

palette_green <- brewer.pal(n=9, name = "Greens")[2:5]

micro <- grep("^Microviridae", unique(Mastertable_viral$Final_FamilyN), value = TRUE)
micro_colors <- setNames(palette_green[seq_along(micro)], micro)

palette_orange <- brewer.pal(n=9, name = "Oranges")[4:6]

ino <- grep("^Inoviridae", unique(Mastertable_viral$Final_FamilyN), value = TRUE)
ino_colors <- setNames(palette_orange[seq_along(ino)], ino)

MyColorsPhageFamiliesN <- c(ino_colors,
                            micro_colors,
                            "Rountreeviridae:FamilyAAI_55_Rountreeviridae" = "#8ac1ff",
                            "Schitoviridae:FamilyAAI_30_Schitoviridae" = "#8DA0CB",
                            unclassified_caudo_colors,
                            "Unclassified Crassvirales:FamilyAAI_134_Suoliviridae" = "#ffd8c3",
                            "Unclassified viruses:FamilyAAI_525" = "#BC80BD")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=7, fig.align='center'}
pal.bands(MyColorsPhageFamiliesN, main = "MyColorsPhageFamiliesN")
```

Colors for predicted bacterial host genus:
```{r echo=FALSE}
MyColorsHostGenus <- c(
  "Actinomyces"= "#E5C494",
  "Allisonella" = "#fca69c",
  "Alloprevotella" = "#E0FF66",
  "Bacteroides" = "#F7E1A0",
  "Bulleidia" = "#bd2fb1",
  "Centipeda" = "#1CBE4F",
  "Corynebacterium" = "#FCCDE5",
  "Fusobacterium" = "#CAB2D6",
  "Granulicatella" = "#BEBADA", 
  "Haemophilus" = "#E7298A",
  "Kingella" = "#80B1D3",
  "Klebsiella" = "#FFCC99",
  "Lachnoanaerobaculum" = "#33a02c",
  "Lactobacillus" = "#990000",
  "Lactococcus" = "#BC80BD",
  "Lancefieldella" = "#FDB462",
  "Ligilactobacillus" = "#FA0087",
  "Limosilactobacillus" = "#1C8356",
  "Megasphaera" = "#A52A3C",
  "Moraxella" = "#FFFF80",
  "Nanoperiomorbus" = "#8ae6ce",
  "Nanosynbacter" = "#FFD92F",
  "Nanosyncoccus" = "#7B1B38",
  "Neisseria" = "#CCEBC5",
  "Pauljensenia" = "#A6D854",
  "Pasteurella" = "#C075A6",
  "Phascolarctobacterium" = "#a5e1ea",
  "Phocaeicola" = "#325A9B",
  "Porphyromonas" = "#ff4848",
  "Prevotella" = "#66C2A5",
  "Proteus" = "#2ED9FF",
  "Pseudomonas" = "#FF0010",
  "Rothia"="#FC8D62",
  "Segatella" = "#778B00",
  "Selenomonas" = "#DEA0FD",
  "Stenotrophomonas" = "#FBE426",
  "Streptococcus" = "#8DA0CB",
  "Treponema" = "#FFFFB3",
  "Vescimonas" = "#dbe796",
  "Veillonella" = "#B2E9EA",
  "Other host genera" = "#8E8E8E",
  "Other bacterial genera" = "#E4E1E3",
  "Unclassified" = "#999999",
  "No iPHoP hit" = "#CCCCCC")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=4, fig.align='center'}
pal.bands(MyColorsHostGenus, main = "MyColorsHostGenus")
```

Colors for phage lifestyle:
```{r echo=FALSE}
MyColorsLifestyle <- c("Temperate" = "#5d859f",
                       "Virulent" = "#d8e4ec",
                       "Chronic"= "#98c0da")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.width=7, fig.height=4, fig.align='center'}
pal.bands(MyColorsLifestyle, main = "MyColorsLifestyle")
```

Colors for disease status:
```{r echo=FALSE}
MyColorsExa_or_stable <- c("Exacerbated_state" = "#BD3027",
                           "Stable_state" = "#90D4CC")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.width=7, fig.height=4, fig.align='center'}
pal.bands(MyColorsExa_or_stable, main = "MyColorsExa_or_stable")
```

Colors for disease severity:
```{r echo=FALSE}
MyColorsSeverity <- c("Moderate" = "#3aa19b",
                      "Severe" = "#eeb733",
                      "Very severe" = "#b83a44")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.width=7, fig.height=4, fig.align='center'}
pal.bands(MyColorsSeverity, main = "MyColorsSeverity")
```

Colors for PHROG categories:
```{r echo=FALSE}
MyColorsPhrog <- phrog_colors <- c(
  "head and packaging" = "#9C964A",
  "connector" = "#FAD77B",
  "tail" = "#CDC08C",
  "lysis" = "#D69C4E",
  "transcription regulation" = "#85D4E3",
  "integration and excision" = "#0B775E",
  "DNA, RNA and nucleotide metabolism" = "#F4B5BD",
  "moron, auxiliary metabolic gene and host takeover" = "#C075A6",
  "virulence factor, DefenseFinder protein" = "#B40F20",
  "other" = "#8E8E8E",
  "unknown function with PHROG hit" = "#8E8E8E",
  "unknown function" = "#E4E1E3",
  "empty" = "#E4E1E3"
)
```

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.width=8, fig.height=6, fig.align='center'}
pal.bands(MyColorsPhrog, main = "MyColorsPhrog")
```

Colors for Anelloviridae genera:
```{r echo=FALSE}
MyColorsAnello <- c("Alphatorquevirus" = "#E7298A",
                    "Betatorquevirus" = "#98c0da",
                    "Gammatorquevirus" = "#A6D854",
                    "Samektorquevirus" = "#CCEBC5",
                    "Memtorquevirus" = "#FEAF16",
                    "Hetorquevirus" = "#ff4848",
                    "Lamedtorquevirus" = "#782AB6",
                    "Unclassified Anelloviridae" = "#FFFFB3",
                    "AERIS_Anelloviridae" = "#191919")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=4, fig.align='center'}
pal.bands(MyColorsAnello, main = "MyColorsAnello")
```

# Visualizations

## Figure 1

### Figure 1a
```{r, fig.align = 'center'}
data_plot <- metadata %>%
  filter(Sample_or_Control == "Sample") %>%
  group_by(CURRCOPD, Exa_or_stable) %>%
  summarize(nb_of_samples = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(CURRCOPD) %>%
  mutate(total_samples = sum(nb_of_samples)) %>%
  mutate(CURRCOPD = factor(CURRCOPD, levels = c("Moderate", "Severe", "Very severe"),
                           labels = c("Moderate\n(GOLD 2)", "Severe\n(GOLD 3)", "Very severe\n(GOLD 4)")))

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(Exa_or_stable = factor(Exa_or_stable, levels = c("Stable_state", "Exacerbated_state")))

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = CURRCOPD, y = nb_of_samples, fill = Exa_or_stable)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = wes_palette("FrenchDispatch"),
    labels = c("Stable state", "Exacerbations")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "COPD Severity (GOLD stage)", y = "Number of Samples") +
  theme_minimal() +
  geom_text(aes(label = nb_of_samples), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5)) +
  geom_text(aes(x = CURRCOPD, y = total_samples, label = paste("N =", total_samples), vjust = -0.5)) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "top",
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10))) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2)))
```

### Figure 1b
```{r, fig.align = 'center'}
venn_data <- list(
  "Total bacterial (B)\nexacerbations" = metadata %>%
    filter(EXATypeDescPCR_EOSBLD2 %in% c("B", "BE", "BV", "BEV")) %>%
    filter(Exa_or_stable == "Exacerbated_state") %>%
    pull(AERISVIR_Internal_ID),
  "Total eosinophilic (E)\nexacerbations" = metadata %>%
    filter(EXATypeDescPCR_EOSBLD2 %in% c("E", "BE", "EV", "BEV")) %>%
    filter(Exa_or_stable == "Exacerbated_state") %>%
    pull(AERISVIR_Internal_ID),
  "Total viral (V) exacerbations" = metadata %>%
    filter(EXATypeDescPCR_EOSBLD2 %in% c("V", "EV", "BV", "BEV")) %>%
    filter(Exa_or_stable == "Exacerbated_state") %>%
    pull(AERISVIR_Internal_ID),
  "No known\nexacerbator" = metadata %>%
    filter(EXATypeDescPCR_EOSBLD2 %in% c("Pauci")) %>%
    filter(Exa_or_stable == "Exacerbated_state") %>%
    pull(AERISVIR_Internal_ID))

total_unique <- length(unique(unlist(venn_data)))

venn_data_reduced <- venn_data[names(venn_data) != "No known\nexacerbator"]

percentages <- sapply(venn_data_reduced, function(x) {length(unique(x)) / total_unique * 100})
percentages <- round(percentages, 0)

counts <- sapply(venn_data_reduced, function(x) {length(unique(x))})


labels <- sapply(names(percentages), function(name){paste0(name, "\n", counts[[name]], "/151 (", percentages[[name]], "%)")})

names(venn_data_reduced) <- labels

ggvenn(venn_data_reduced,
  fill_color = wes_palette("Chevalier1"),
  stroke_color = NA, stroke_size = 0, set_name_size = 3, 
  text_size = 6, digits = 0, show_percentage = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = .25))
```

### Figure 1c
```{r, fig.align = 'center'}
data_plot <- COUNTS %>% 
  filter(Samples %in% samples) %>%
  select(Raw_reads, Trimmed_reads, Mapped_reads, GQ_Mapped_viral_reads) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), sum, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(),
               names_to = "Subgroup",
               values_to = "Total") %>%
  mutate(Percentage = Total / Total[Subgroup == "Raw_reads"] * 100)

data_plot <- data_plot %>% 
  mutate(Subgroup = factor(Subgroup, levels = c("Raw_reads", "Trimmed_reads", "Mapped_reads", "GQ_Mapped_viral_reads"),
                           labels = c("Raw","Trimmed", 
                                      "Mapping to de novo\nassembled contigs",
                                      "Mapping to vOTUs\n(Eukaryotic viruses +\nBacteriophages\n>50% complete)"))) 

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = Subgroup, y = Percentage, fill = Subgroup)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(values =  wes_palette("Moonrise2")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme (
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_markdown(),
    legend.position = " none") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(Percentage, digits = 1), "%\nN = ", scientific(Total))), position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), vjust = -0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.24)))
```

### Figure 1d
```{r, fig.align = 'center'}
data_plot <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  select(CONTIGS, Final_viral, length) %>%
  mutate(Final_viral = factor(Final_viral, levels = c("Eukaryotic viruses", "Good-quality phages", "Good-quality unclassified viruses"),
                              labels = c("Eukaryotic viruses", "Phages (>50% complete)", "Unclassified viruses")))

ggplot(data_plot, aes(length, fill = Final_viral)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.1, position = "identity", alpha = 0.4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values =  wes_palette("Cavalcanti1")[c(1,2,5)]) +
  scale_color_manual(values =  wes_palette("Cavalcanti1")[c(1,2,5)]) +
  scale_x_log10(breaks = c(1000, 5000, 10000, 50000, 100000),
                labels = c("1kb", "5kb", "10kb", "50kb", "100kb")) +
  labs(y = "Number of vOTUS", x = "Length of vOTUs (Log10)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10)),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "top") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)))
```

### Figure 1e
```{r, fig.align = 'center'}
data_plot <- COUNTS %>%
  filter(Samples %in% samples) %>%
  mutate(GQ_Viral_contigs =
           case_when(
             GQ_Viral_contigs >= 30 ~ "30+",
             GQ_Viral_contigs >= 25 ~ "25-29",
             GQ_Viral_contigs >= 20 ~ "20-24",
             GQ_Viral_contigs >= 15 ~ "15-19",
             GQ_Viral_contigs >= 10 ~ "10-14",
             GQ_Viral_contigs >= 10 ~ "10-14",
             GQ_Viral_contigs >= 5 ~ "5-9",
             TRUE ~ as.character(GQ_Viral_contigs))) %>%
  mutate(GQ_Viral_contigs = factor(GQ_Viral_contigs,
                                   levels = c(as.character(0:4), "5-9", "10-14", "15-19", "20-24", "25-29", "30+")))

data_plot <- merge(data_plot, metadata, by.x = "Samples", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(Exa_or_stable = factor(Exa_or_stable, levels = c("Stable_state", "Exacerbated_state")))

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = GQ_Viral_contigs, fill = Exa_or_stable)) +
  geom_bar() +
  geom_text(stat = "count", aes(label = after_stat(count)), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.6), size = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = wes_palette("FrenchDispatch"),
    labels = c("Stable state", "Exacerbations")) +
  labs(x = "Number of viral contigs", y = "Number of Samples") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "top",
        axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10))) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)))
```

### Figure 1f
```{r, fig.align = 'center'}
data_plot <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  group_by(Final_viral, checkv_quality) %>%
  summarize(nb_of_contigs = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(viral_categories =
           case_when(
             Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses" ~ "Eukaryotic viruses",
             grepl("nclassified viruses", Final_viral) ~ "Unclassified viruses",
             grepl("phages", Final_viral) & checkv_quality == "Complete" ~ "Complete phages",
             grepl("phages", Final_viral) & checkv_quality == "High-quality" ~ "High-quality phages\n>90% complete",
             grepl("phages", Final_viral) & checkv_quality == "Medium-quality" ~ "Medium-quality phages\n>50% complete",
           )) %>%
  group_by(viral_categories) %>%
  summarize(nb_of_contigs = sum(nb_of_contigs))

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(viral_categories = factor(viral_categories, 
                                   levels = c("Eukaryotic viruses", 
                                              "Medium-quality phages\n>50% complete", 
                                              "High-quality phages\n>90% complete", 
                                              "Complete phages", 
                                              "Unclassified viruses")))

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = viral_categories, y = nb_of_contigs, fill = viral_categories)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(values =  wes_palette("IsleofDogs2")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(y = "Number of vOTUS") +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, size = 10, hjust = 1),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10)),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_blank()) +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  geom_text(aes(x = viral_categories, y = nb_of_contigs, label = paste("N =", nb_of_contigs), vjust = -0.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.06)))
```

## Figure 2

### Figure 2a
```{r, fig.align = 'center'}
samples_with_reads <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  select(all_of(samples)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), sum, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  select_if(~ . > 0) %>%
  colnames()

abundances_TPM_pos_only <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  select(c("CONTIGS", "length"), all_of(samples_with_reads), all_of(grep("^Final", colnames(Mastertable_viral)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples_with_reads, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") 

abundances_TPM_pos_only$RPK <- abundances_TPM_pos_only$mapped_reads/abundances_TPM_pos_only$length

data_plot <- abundances_TPM_pos_only %>%
  filter(Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, Final_Family) %>%
  summarize(RPK = sum(RPK), .groups = 'drop')

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  mutate(RPK_total = sum(RPK),
         TPM = (RPK / RPK_total) * 10^6)

data_plot <- merge(data_plot, metadata, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

data_summary <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(Exa_or_stable = case_when(
    Exa_or_stable == "Stable_state" ~ "Stable state",
    Exa_or_stable == "Exacerbated_state" & EXAViral == "1" ~ "Viral exacerbations",
    Exa_or_stable == "Exacerbated_state" & EXAViral == "0" ~ "Non-viral exacerbations",
    Exa_or_stable == "Exacerbated_state" & is.na(EXAViral) ~ "Non-viral exacerbations",
  ))

data_summary <- data_summary %>%
  group_by(PID, Exa_or_stable, Final_Family) %>%
  summarize(mean_TPM_patient = mean(TPM), 
            n_per_PID = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Exa_or_stable, Final_Family) %>%
  summarize(mean = mean(mean_TPM_patient),
            N_samples = sum(n_per_PID),
            N_patients = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Final_Family) %>%
  filter(sum(mean) != 0)

data_summary <- data_summary %>%
  mutate(Exa_or_stable = factor(Exa_or_stable, levels = c("Stable state", "Viral exacerbations", "Non-viral exacerbations")))

sample_size <- data_summary %>% 
  group_by(Exa_or_stable) %>% 
  summarise(N_samples = unique(N_samples), 
            N_patients = unique(N_patients), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(N = paste0(Exa_or_stable, "\nN=", N_samples, "\n(", N_patients, " patients)"))

x_labels <- setNames(sample_size$N, sample_size$Exa_or_stable)

ggplot(data = data_summary, aes(x = Exa_or_stable, y = mean, fill = Final_Family)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand=c(0,0)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Transcripts Per Kilobase Million (TPM)", fill = "Viral Family")  +
  scale_fill_manual(values=MyColorsViralFamilies, drop = TRUE) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 12))
```

### Figure 2b
```{r, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4, fig.align = 'center'}
abundances_TPM <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  select(c("CONTIGS", "length"), all_of(samples), all_of(grep("^Final", colnames(Mastertable_viral)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") 

abundances_TPM$RPK <- abundances_TPM$mapped_reads/abundances_TPM$length

abundances_TPM <- abundances_TPM %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  mutate(RPK_total = sum(RPK),
         TPM = (RPK / RPK_total) * 10^6)

abundances_TPM$TPM[is.nan(abundances_TPM$TPM)] <- 0

abundances_TPM <- abundances_TPM %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, Final_Species) %>%
  summarize(TPM_by_species = sum(TPM)) %>%
  summarize(observed_richness = sum(c_across(TPM_by_species) > 0), shannon_diversity = diversity(c_across(TPM_by_species), index = "shannon"))

abundances_TPM <- merge(abundances_TPM, metadata, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

data_plot <- abundances_TPM %>%
  mutate(Exa_or_stable = case_when(
    Exa_or_stable == "Stable_state" ~ "Stable state",
    Exa_or_stable == "Exacerbated_state" & EXAViral == "1" ~ "Viral\nexacerbations",
    Exa_or_stable == "Exacerbated_state" & EXAViral == "0" ~ "Non-viral\nexacerbations",
    Exa_or_stable == "Exacerbated_state" & is.na(EXAViral) ~ "Non-viral\nexacerbations")) %>%
  mutate(Exa_or_stable = factor(Exa_or_stable, levels = c("Stable state", "Viral\nexacerbations", "Non-viral\nexacerbations")))

counts <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(Exa_or_stable) %>%
  summarise(N = n_distinct(sample_ID))

x_labels <- setNames(paste0(levels(data_plot$Exa_or_stable), "\nN = ", counts$N), levels(data_plot$Exa_or_stable))

stat.test <- data_plot %>% 
  wilcox_test(observed_richness ~ Exa_or_stable) %>%
  add_significance() %>%
  add_xy_position(x = "Exa_or_stable")

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = Exa_or_stable, y = observed_richness)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = Exa_or_stable, fill = Exa_or_stable), width = 0.5, alpha = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Exa_or_stable), width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 2, alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wes_palette("FrenchDispatch")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = wes_palette("FrenchDispatch")) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Observed Richness") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 12, by = 4)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(linewidth = 1.2),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15, vjust = 2, margin = margin(r = 15)),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.position = "none") +
  stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test, label = "p.adj.signif", hide.ns = TRUE, tip.length = 0)
```
```{r echo=FALSE}
datatable(stat.test)
```

```{r, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4, fig.align = 'center'}
stat.test <- data_plot %>% 
  wilcox_test(shannon_diversity ~ Exa_or_stable) %>%
  add_significance() %>%
  add_xy_position(x = "Exa_or_stable")

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = Exa_or_stable, y = shannon_diversity)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = Exa_or_stable, fill = Exa_or_stable), width = 0.5, alpha = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Exa_or_stable), width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 2, alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wes_palette("FrenchDispatch")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = wes_palette("FrenchDispatch")) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Shannon Diversity Index") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(linewidth = 1.2),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15, vjust = 2, margin = margin(r = 15)),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.position = "none") +
  stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test, label = "p.adj.signif", hide.ns = TRUE, tip.length = 0) 
```
```{r echo=FALSE}
datatable(stat.test)
```

### Figure 2c
```{r, fig.align = 'center'}
color_map <- data.frame(label = my_anello_seq_2kbfiltered, Clade = "AERIS_Anelloviridae")

color_map <- color_map %>%
  filter(label %in% tree_anello$tip.label) %>%
  bind_rows(anello_references %>% select(label, Clade)) %>%
  mutate(Clade = str_replace(Clade, "^.", ~ toupper(.x))) %>%
  mutate(Clade = case_when(
    Clade != "AERIS_Anelloviridae" ~ paste0(Clade, "torquevirus"),
    TRUE ~ Clade))

tree <- ggtree(tree_anello,layout = "equal_angle", color = "grey", size = 0.3) %<+% color_map

tree + geom_tippoint(aes(color = Clade), size = 1.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = MyColorsAnello) +
  theme(legend.position = "right") +
  geom_tippoint(data = function(x) subset(x, grepl("AERIS", label)), size = 1.5, color = "#191919")

```

### Figure 2d
```{r, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4, fig.align = 'center'}
genus_counts <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(Final_Family == "Anelloviridae") %>%
  count(Final_GenusN)

ggplot(genus_counts, aes(x = 2, y = n, fill = reorder(Final_GenusN, n))) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  labs(fill = "Anelloviridae Genus") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=MyColorsAnello) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.title = element_text(size =12)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(reverse=TRUE)) +
  xlim(0.8, 2.5)
```

### Figure 2e
```{r, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4, fig.align = 'center'}
abundances_TPM <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(Final_Family == "Anelloviridae") %>%
  select(c("CONTIGS", "length", "Final_GenusN"), all_of(samples)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") 

abundances_TPM$RPK <- abundances_TPM$mapped_reads/abundances_TPM$length

abundances_TPM <- abundances_TPM %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  mutate(RPK_total = sum(RPK),
         TPM = (RPK / RPK_total) * 10^6)

abundances_TPM$TPM[is.nan(abundances_TPM$TPM)] <- 0

abundances_TPM <- abundances_TPM %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, Final_GenusN) %>%
  summarize(TPM_by_genera = sum(TPM)) %>%
  summarize(observed_richness = sum(c_across(TPM_by_genera) > 0), shannon_diversity = diversity(c_across(TPM_by_genera), index = "shannon"))

abundances_TPM <- merge(abundances_TPM, metadata, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

data_plot <- abundances_TPM %>% 
  mutate(Exa_or_stable = factor(Exa_or_stable, levels = c("Stable_state", "Exacerbated_state"),
                                labels = c("Stable state", "Exacerbations")))

counts <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(Exa_or_stable) %>%
  summarise(N = n_distinct(sample_ID))

x_labels <- setNames(paste0(levels(data_plot$Exa_or_stable), "\nN = ", counts$N), levels(data_plot$Exa_or_stable))

stat.test <- data_plot %>% 
  wilcox_test(observed_richness ~ Exa_or_stable) %>%
  add_significance() %>%
  add_xy_position(x = "Exa_or_stable") %>%
  mutate(y.position = y.position + 0.5)

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = Exa_or_stable, y = observed_richness)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = Exa_or_stable, fill = Exa_or_stable), width = 0.5, alpha = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Exa_or_stable), width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 2, alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wes_palette("FrenchDispatch")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = wes_palette("FrenchDispatch")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Observed Richness") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(size = 1.2),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15, vjust = 2, margin = margin(r = 15)),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.position = "none") +
  stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test, label = "p.signif", hide.ns = TRUE, tip.length = 0)
```
```{r echo=FALSE}
datatable(stat.test)
```

```{r, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4, fig.align = 'center'}
stat.test <- data_plot %>% 
  wilcox_test(shannon_diversity ~ Exa_or_stable) %>%
  add_significance() %>%
  add_xy_position(x = "Exa_or_stable") %>%
  mutate(y.position = y.position + 0.1)

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = Exa_or_stable, y = shannon_diversity)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = Exa_or_stable, fill = Exa_or_stable), width = 0.5, alpha = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Exa_or_stable), width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 2, alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wes_palette("FrenchDispatch")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = wes_palette("FrenchDispatch")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Shannon Diversity Index") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(size = 1.2),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15, vjust = 2, margin = margin(r = 15)),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.position = "none") +
  stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test, label = "p.signif", hide.ns = TRUE, tip.length = 0)
```
```{r echo=FALSE}
datatable(stat.test)
```

### Figure 2f
```{r, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4, fig.align = 'center'}
abundances_TPM <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(Final_Family == "Anelloviridae") %>%
  select(c("CONTIGS", "length", "Final_GenusN"), all_of(samples)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") 

abundances_TPM$RPK <- abundances_TPM$mapped_reads/abundances_TPM$length

abundances_TPM <- abundances_TPM %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  mutate(RPK_total = sum(RPK),
         TPM = (RPK / RPK_total) * 10^6)

abundances_TPM$TPM[is.nan(abundances_TPM$TPM)] <- 0

abundances_TPM <- abundances_TPM %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, Final_GenusN) %>%
  summarize(TPM_by_genera = sum(TPM)) %>%
  summarize(observed_richness = sum(c_across(TPM_by_genera) > 0), shannon_diversity = diversity(c_across(TPM_by_genera), index = "shannon"))

abundances_TPM <- merge(abundances_TPM, metadata, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

data_plot <- abundances_TPM %>% 
  filter(CURRCOPD %in% c("Moderate", "Severe", "Very severe")) %>%
  mutate(CURRCOPD = factor(CURRCOPD, levels = c("Moderate", "Severe", "Very severe")))

counts <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(CURRCOPD) %>%
  summarise(N = n_distinct(sample_ID))

x_labels <- setNames(paste0(levels(data_plot$CURRCOPD), "\nN = ", counts$N), levels(data_plot$CURRCOPD))

stat.test <- data_plot %>% 
  wilcox_test(observed_richness ~ CURRCOPD, p.adjust.method = "holm") %>%
  add_xy_position(x = "CURRCOPD")

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = CURRCOPD, y = observed_richness)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = CURRCOPD, fill = CURRCOPD), width = 0.5, alpha = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = CURRCOPD), width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 1.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = MyColorsSeverity) +
  scale_color_manual(values = MyColorsSeverity) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 10, by = 2)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Observed Richness") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(size = 1.2),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15, vjust = 2, margin = margin(r = 15)),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.position = "none") +
  stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test, label = "p.adj.signif", hide.ns = TRUE, tip.length = 0)
```
```{r echo=FALSE}
datatable(stat.test)
```

```{r, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4, fig.align = 'center'}
stat.test <- data_plot %>% 
  wilcox_test(shannon_diversity ~ CURRCOPD, p.adjust.method = "holm") %>%
  add_xy_position(x = "CURRCOPD")

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = CURRCOPD, y = shannon_diversity)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = CURRCOPD, fill = CURRCOPD),  width = 0.5, alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = CURRCOPD), width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 1.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = MyColorsSeverity) +
  scale_color_manual(values = MyColorsSeverity) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Shannon Diversity Index") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(size = 1.2),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15, vjust = 2, margin = margin(r = 15)),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.position = "none") +
  stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test, label = "p.adj.signif", hide.ns = TRUE, tip.length = 0)
```
```{r echo=FALSE}
datatable(stat.test)
```

## Figure 3

### Figure 3a
```{r, fig.width = 15, fig.height = 6, fig.align = 'center'}
samples_with_reads <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(!Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  select(all_of(samples)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), sum, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  select_if(~ . > 0) %>%
  colnames()

abundances_TPM_pos_only <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  select(c("CONTIGS", "length"), all_of(samples_with_reads), all_of(grep("^Final", colnames(Mastertable_viral)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples_with_reads, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") 

abundances_TPM_pos_only$RPK <- abundances_TPM_pos_only$mapped_reads/abundances_TPM_pos_only$length

data_plot <- abundances_TPM_pos_only %>%
  filter(!Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, Final_FamilyN) %>%
  summarize(RPK = sum(RPK), .groups = 'drop')

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  mutate(RPK_total = sum(RPK),
         TPM = (RPK / RPK_total) * 10^6)

data_plot <- merge(data_plot, metadata, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

data_summary <- data_plot %>%
  filter(CURRCOPD %in% c("Moderate", "Severe", "Very severe")) %>%
  group_by(PID, CURRCOPD, Final_FamilyN) %>%
  summarize(mean_TPM_patient = mean(TPM),
            n_per_PID = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(CURRCOPD, Final_FamilyN) %>%
  summarize(mean = mean(mean_TPM_patient),
            N_samples = sum(n_per_PID),
            N_patients = n(), .groups = "drop")

sample_size <- data_summary %>% 
  group_by(CURRCOPD) %>% 
  summarise(N_samples = unique(N_samples), 
            N_patients = unique(N_patients), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(N = paste0(CURRCOPD, "\nN=", N_samples, " (", N_patients, " patients)"))

data_summary$CURRCOPD <- factor(data_summary$CURRCOPD, levels = c("Moderate", "Severe", "Very severe"))

ggplot(data = data_summary, aes(x = CURRCOPD, y = mean, fill = Final_FamilyN)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand=c(0,0)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Transcripts Per Kilobase Million (TPM)", fill = "Phage Family")  +
  scale_fill_manual(values=MyColorsPhageFamiliesN) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = setNames(sample_size$N, sample_size$CURRCOPD)) + 
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 12))
```

### Figure 3b
```{r, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4, fig.align = 'center'}
abundances_TPM <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(!Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  select(c("CONTIGS", "length"), all_of(samples), all_of(grep("^Final", colnames(Mastertable_viral)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") 

abundances_TPM$RPK <- abundances_TPM$mapped_reads/abundances_TPM$length

abundances_TPM <- abundances_TPM %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  mutate(RPK_total = sum(RPK),
         TPM = (RPK / RPK_total) * 10^6)

abundances_TPM$TPM[is.nan(abundances_TPM$TPM)] <- 0

abundances_TPM <- abundances_TPM %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(observed_richness = sum(c_across(TPM) > 0), shannon_diversity = diversity(c_across(TPM), index = "shannon"))

abundances_TPM <- merge(abundances_TPM, metadata, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

data_plot <- abundances_TPM %>% 
  filter(CURRCOPD %in% c("Moderate", "Severe", "Very severe")) %>%
  mutate(CURRCOPD = factor(CURRCOPD, levels = c("Moderate", "Severe", "Very severe")))

counts <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(CURRCOPD) %>%
  summarise(N = n_distinct(sample_ID))

x_labels <- setNames(paste0(levels(data_plot$CURRCOPD), "\nN = ", counts$N), levels(data_plot$CURRCOPD))

stat.test <- data_plot %>% 
  wilcox_test(observed_richness ~ CURRCOPD, p.adjust.method = "holm") %>%
  add_xy_position(x = "CURRCOPD")

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = CURRCOPD, y = observed_richness)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = CURRCOPD, fill = CURRCOPD), width = 0.5, alpha = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = CURRCOPD), width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 1.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = MyColorsSeverity) +
  scale_color_manual(values = MyColorsSeverity) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 10, by = 2)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Observed Richness") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(size = 1.2),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15, vjust = 2, margin = margin(r = 15)),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.position = "none") +
  stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test, label = "p.adj.signif", hide.ns = TRUE, tip.length = 0)
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
datatable(stat.test)
```

```{r, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4, fig.align = 'center'}
stat.test <- data_plot %>% 
  wilcox_test(shannon_diversity ~ CURRCOPD, p.adjust.method = "holm") %>%
  add_xy_position(x = "CURRCOPD")

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = CURRCOPD, y = shannon_diversity)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = CURRCOPD, fill = CURRCOPD),  width = 0.5, alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = CURRCOPD), width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 1.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = MyColorsSeverity) +
  scale_color_manual(values = MyColorsSeverity) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Shannon Diversity Index") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(size = 1.2),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15, vjust = 2, margin = margin(r = 15)),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.position = "none") +
  stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test, label = "p.adj.signif", hide.ns = TRUE, tip.length = 0)
```
```{r echo=FALSE}
datatable(stat.test)
```

## Figure 4

### Figure 4a
```{r, fig.width = 12, fig.height = 6, fig.align = 'center'}
samples_with_reads <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(!Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  select(all_of(samples)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), sum, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  select_if(~ . > 0) %>%
  colnames()

abundances_TPM_pos_only <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(!Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  select(c("CONTIGS", "length"), all_of(samples_with_reads), all_of(grep("^Host", colnames(Mastertable_viral)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples_with_reads, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") 

abundances_TPM_pos_only$RPK <- abundances_TPM_pos_only$mapped_reads/abundances_TPM_pos_only$length

data_plot <- abundances_TPM_pos_only %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, Host_Genus) %>%
  summarize(RPK = sum(RPK), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  mutate(RPK_total = sum(RPK),
         TPM = (RPK / RPK_total) * 10^6)

data_plot <- merge(data_plot, metadata, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

data_summary <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(PID, CURRCOPD, Host_Genus) %>%
  summarize(mean_TPM_patient = mean(TPM), 
            n_per_PID = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(CURRCOPD, Host_Genus) %>%
  summarize(mean = mean(mean_TPM_patient),
            N_samples = sum(n_per_PID),
            N_patients = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(percentage = mean / 10^4) %>%
  mutate(Host_Genus = ifelse(percentage > 1, Host_Genus, "Other host genera")) %>%
  mutate(Host_Genus = ifelse(is.na(Host_Genus), "No iPHoP hit", Host_Genus))

sample_size <- data_summary %>% 
  group_by(CURRCOPD) %>% 
  summarise(N_samples = unique(N_samples), 
            N_patients = unique(N_patients), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(N = paste0(CURRCOPD, "\nN=", N_samples, "\n(", N_patients, " patients)"))

create_pie <- function(data, severity) {
  data <- data_summary %>%
    filter(CURRCOPD == severity) %>%
    group_by(Host_Genus) %>%
    summarize(percentage = sum(percentage)) %>%
    arrange(desc(percentage)) %>%
    mutate(lab.ypos = cumsum(percentage) - 0.5 * percentage)
  
  ggplot(data, aes(x = 2, y = percentage, fill = reorder(Host_Genus, percentage))) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "white", show.legend = FALSE) +
    coord_polar(theta = "y", start = 0) +
    geom_text(data = subset(data, percentage > 3), aes(y = lab.ypos, label = paste0(sprintf("%.1f", percentage), "%")), color = "black") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = MyColorsHostGenus) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(plot.margin = margin(t = 0, r = 0, b = -200, l = 0)) +
    xlim(0.8, 2.5)
}

pie_moderate <- create_pie(data_summary, "Moderate")
pie_severe <- create_pie(data_summary, "Severe")
pie_very_severe <- create_pie(data_summary, "Very severe")

data_summary <- data_summary %>%
  mutate(Host_Genus = factor(Host_Genus, levels = c(setdiff(sort(unique(Host_Genus)), c("Other host genera","No iPHoP hit")), "Other host genera","No iPHoP hit")))

legend <- get_legend(
  ggplot(data_summary, aes(x = 2, y = percentage, fill = Host_Genus)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = MyColorsHostGenus, guide = guide_legend(ncol = 2)) +
  labs(fill= "Host Genus") +
  theme_void())

caption_moderate <- sample_size$N[sample_size$CURRCOPD == "Moderate"]
caption_severe <- sample_size$N[sample_size$CURRCOPD == "Severe"]
caption_very_severe <- sample_size$N[sample_size$CURRCOPD == "Very severe"]

caption_moderate_grob <- ggdraw() + draw_label(caption_moderate, hjust = 0.5, size = 12)
caption_severe_grob <- ggdraw() + draw_label(caption_severe, hjust = 0.5, size = 12)
caption_very_severe_grob <- ggdraw() + draw_label(caption_very_severe, hjust = 0.5, size = 12)

plot_moderate <- plot_grid(pie_moderate, caption_moderate_grob, ncol = 1)
plot_severe <- plot_grid(pie_severe, caption_severe_grob, ncol = 1)
plot_very_severe <- plot_grid(pie_very_severe, caption_very_severe_grob, ncol = 1)

plot_grid(
  plot_grid(plot_moderate, plot_severe, plot_very_severe, ncol = 3),
  legend,
  ncol = 2, rel_widths = c(2, 1))
```

### Figure 4b
```{r, fig.width = 8, fig.height = 3, fig.align = 'center'}
samples_with_reads <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(!Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  select(all_of(samples)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), sum, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  select_if(~ . > 0) %>%
  colnames()

abundances_TPM_pos_only <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(!Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  select(c("CONTIGS", "length"), all_of(samples_with_reads), all_of(grep("^Host", colnames(Mastertable_viral)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples_with_reads, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") 

abundances_TPM_pos_only$RPK <- abundances_TPM_pos_only$mapped_reads/abundances_TPM_pos_only$length

data_plot <- abundances_TPM_pos_only %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, Host_Genus) %>%
  summarize(RPK = sum(RPK), .groups = 'drop')

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  mutate(RPK_total = sum(RPK),
         TPM = (RPK / RPK_total) * 10^6)

data_plot <- merge(data_plot, metadata, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  filter(CURRCOPD %in% c("Moderate", "Severe", "Very severe")) %>%
  mutate(CURRCOPD = factor(CURRCOPD, levels = c("Moderate", "Severe", "Very severe"))) %>%
  mutate(Host_Genus = ifelse(is.na(Host_Genus), "No iPHoP hit", Host_Genus)) %>%
  group_by(Host_Genus) %>%
  filter(sum(TPM) > 0)

counts <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(CURRCOPD) %>%
  summarise(N = n_distinct(sample_ID))

x_labels <- setNames(paste0(levels(data_plot$CURRCOPD), "\nN = ", counts$N), levels(data_plot$CURRCOPD))

excl_stat <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(Host_Genus, CURRCOPD) %>%
  summarize(var = n_distinct(TPM), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Host_Genus) %>%
  summarise(n_var = sum(var == 1), .groups = "drop") %>%
```
