```{r, fig.width = 8, fig.height = 3, fig.align = 'center'}
  filter(n_var >= 2) %>%
  pull(Host_Genus)

stat.test <- data_plot %>% 
  filter(!Host_Genus %in% excl_stat) %>%
  group_by(Host_Genus) %>%
  wilcox_test(TPM ~ CURRCOPD, p.adjust.method = "holm", paired = FALSE) %>%
  add_y_position() %>%
  mutate(y.position = y.position - 180000)

Host_Genus_Signifdiff <- stat.test$Host_Genus[!stat.test$p.adj.signif == "ns"]

data_plot <- data_plot %>% 
  filter(Host_Genus %in% Host_Genus_Signifdiff)

ggplot(data_plot, (aes(x=CURRCOPD, y = TPM))) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = Host_Genus, fill = Host_Genus), width = 0.5, alpha = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Host_Genus), width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 2, alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = MyColorsHostGenus) +
  scale_color_manual(values = MyColorsHostGenus) +
  labs(x = "", y = "TPM") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 12),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        strip.text = element_text(size = 8, margin = margin(b = 60, t = 10))) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  facet_wrap(~Host_Genus, scales = "free_x", strip.position = "top", ncol = 3) +
  stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test, label = "p.adj.signif", hide.ns = TRUE, tip.length = 0) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1000000), clip = "off")

```

### Figure 4c
```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 5, fig.align = 'center'}
abundance_bact <- Mastertable_bact %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("SRR"), names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads")

abundance_bact <- abundance_bact %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, Order, Family, Genus, .groups = "drop") %>%
  summarize(reads_by_genus = sum(mapped_reads)) %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  mutate(total_reads_in_sample = sum(reads_by_genus),
         rel_abund_by_genus = reads_by_genus/total_reads_in_sample*100)

abundance_bact <- merge(abundance_bact, SRAruntable, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "Run", all = TRUE)
abundance_bact <- abundance_bact %>%
  rename(Date_Visits = Collection_Date, PID = subjectID, SRR_ID = sample_ID)

abundance_bact <- merge(abundance_bact, metadata, 
                        by = c("Date_Visits", "PID"), all = FALSE)

abundances_TPM_pos_only <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(!Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  select(c("CONTIGS", "length"), all_of(samples), all_of(grep("^Host", colnames(Mastertable_viral)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") 

abundances_TPM_pos_only$RPK <- abundances_TPM_pos_only$mapped_reads/abundances_TPM_pos_only$length

abundances_TPM_pos_only <- abundances_TPM_pos_only %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, Host_Genus) %>%
  summarize(RPK = sum(RPK), .groups = 'drop')

abundances_TPM_pos_only <- abundances_TPM_pos_only %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  mutate(RPK_total = sum(RPK),
         rel_abund_by_host_genus = ifelse(RPK_total == 0, 0, (RPK / RPK_total) * 10^2))

#For Haemophilus
data_plot <- abundances_TPM_pos_only %>%
  filter(grepl("Haemophilus", Host_Genus)) %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(rel_abund_phage = sum(rel_abund_by_host_genus))

data_plot <- merge(data_plot, abundance_bact, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  filter(Genus == "Haemophilus") %>%
  filter(rel_abund_by_genus > 0)

cor_test <- cor.test(data_plot$rel_abund_by_genus, data_plot$rel_abund_phage, method = "pearson", use = pairwise.complete.obs)
r <- round(cor_test$estimate, 3)
p_value <- ifelse(cor_test$p.value < 0.001, "< 0.001", paste0("= ", round(cor_test$p.value, 3)))

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = rel_abund_by_genus, y = rel_abund_phage)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = 5), alpha = 0.3,  color = "#E7298A" , fill = "#E7298A") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#5A5156", linetype = "dashed", na.rm = TRUE) +
  labs(x = "Haemophilus bacteria (%)", y = "Haemophilus-infecting phages (%)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  annotate("text", x = max(data_plot$rel_abund_by_genus), y = max(data_plot$rel_abund_phage), 
           label = paste0("Pearson's r = ", r, ", p ", p_value),
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = 5) 

#For Prevotella
data_plot <- abundances_TPM_pos_only %>%
  filter(grepl("Prevotella", Host_Genus)) %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(rel_abund_phage = sum(rel_abund_by_host_genus))

data_plot <- merge(data_plot, abundance_bact, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  filter(Genus == "Prevotella") %>%
  filter(rel_abund_by_genus > 0)

cor_test <- cor.test(data_plot$rel_abund_by_genus, data_plot$rel_abund_phage, method = "pearson", use = pairwise.complete.obs)
r <- round(cor_test$estimate, 3)
p_value <- ifelse(cor_test$p.value < 0.001, "< 0.001", paste0("= ", round(cor_test$p.value, 3)))

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = rel_abund_by_genus, y = rel_abund_phage)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = 5), alpha = 0.3,  color = "#66C2A5" , fill = "#66C2A5") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#5A5156", linetype = "dashed", 
              na.rm = TRUE) +
  labs(x = "Prevotella bacteria (%)", y = "Prevotella-infecting phages (%)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  annotate("text", x = max(data_plot$rel_abund_by_genus), y = max(data_plot$rel_abund_phage), 
           label = paste0("Pearson's r = ", r, ", p ", p_value),
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = 3) 

#For Streptococcus
data_plot <- abundances_TPM_pos_only %>%
  filter(grepl("Streptococcus", Host_Genus)) %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  summarize(rel_abund_phage = sum(rel_abund_by_host_genus))

data_plot <- merge(data_plot, abundance_bact, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  filter(Genus == "Streptococcus") %>%
  filter(rel_abund_by_genus > 0)

cor_test <- cor.test(data_plot$rel_abund_by_genus, data_plot$rel_abund_phage, method = "pearson", use = pairwise.complete.obs)
r <- round(cor_test$estimate, 3)
p_value <- ifelse(cor_test$p.value < 0.001, "< 0.001", paste0("= ", round(cor_test$p.value, 3)))

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = rel_abund_by_genus, y = rel_abund_phage)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = 5), alpha = 0.3,  color = "#8DA0CB" , fill = "#8DA0CB") +
  labs(x = "Streptococcus bacteria (%)", y = "Streptococcus-infecting phages (%)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  annotate("text", x = max(data_plot$rel_abund_by_genus), y = max(data_plot$rel_abund_phage), 
           label = paste0("Pearson's r = ", r, ", p ", p_value),
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = 15)
```

### Figure 4d
```{r, fig.width = 13, fig.height = 12, fig.align = 'center'}
phold_annotation <- read.delim(here("data/PHAGE_ANNOTATION/PHOLD", "AERIS_phold_per_cds_predictions.tsv"), header = TRUE)
vfdb_cds_predictions <- read.delim(here("data/PHAGE_ANNOTATION/PHOLD", "vfdb_cds_predictions.tsv"), header = TRUE)
defensefinder_cds_predictions <- read.delim(here("data/PHAGE_ANNOTATION/PHOLD", "defensefinder_cds_predictions.tsv"), header = TRUE)

funct_annot <- phold_annotation %>%
  left_join(., vfdb_cds_predictions[c("cds_id", "description")], by = "cds_id") %>%
  left_join(., defensefinder_cds_predictions[c("cds_id", "proteins_in_the_prediction")], by = "cds_id") %>%
  mutate(function. = ifelse(is.na(description), function., "virulence factor, DefenseFinder protein"),
         product = ifelse(is.na(description), product, paste0("virulence factor\n", description)),
         function. = ifelse(is.na(proteins_in_the_prediction), function., "virulence factor, DefenseFinder protein"),
         product = ifelse(is.na(proteins_in_the_prediction), product, paste0("DefenseFinder protein\n", proteins_in_the_prediction)),
         product = str_replace_all(product, "enoyl-CoA hydratase/carnithine racemase-like", "enoyl-CoA hydratase/\ncarnithine racemase-like"),
         product = str_replace_all(product, "LPXTG cell wall anchor domain-containing protein", "LPXTG cell wall anchor\ndomain-containing protein"),
         function. = ifelse(function. == "", "empty", function.),
         function. = ifelse(function. == "unknown function" & phrog != "No_PHROG", "unknown function with PHROG hit", function.)) %>%
  select(-description)

contigs_of_interest <- funct_annot %>%
  filter(function. %in% c("moron, auxiliary metabolic gene and host takeover", "virulence factor")) %>%
  distinct(contig_id) %>%
  pull(contig_id)

funct_annot <- funct_annot %>%
  filter(contig_id %in% contigs_of_interest) %>%
  left_join(., Mastertable_viral[c("CONTIGS", "length", "completeness", "Final_FamilyN", "Host_Genus")], by = join_by(contig_id == CONTIGS)) %>%
  mutate(genome_label = paste0(contig_id, " - ", Final_FamilyN, "\n - CheckV completeness: ", completeness, "%", " - iPhoP predicted host: ", Host_Genus)) %>%
  select(contig_id, length, genome_label, start, end, strand, phrog, function., product, Final_FamilyN, Host_Genus) %>%
  rename(seq_id = contig_id, funct = function.) %>%
  mutate(
    type = "CDS",
    fill_group = funct,
    vf_label = ifelse(funct == "virulence factor, DefenseFinder protein", as.character(product), NA_character_),
    moron_amg_label = ifelse(funct == "moron, auxiliary metabolic gene and host takeover", 
                              as.character(product), NA_character_)
  )

funct_annot_COI <- funct_annot %>%
  filter(Host_Genus == "Haemophilus") %>%
  mutate(seq_id = factor(seq_id, levels = c("NODE_A23_length_24188_cov_1.012315_AERISVIR237",
                                            "NODE_A16_length_30981_cov_6.715335_AERISVIR387",
                                            "NODE_A14_length_44717_cov_8.708888_AERISVIR357",
                                            "NODE_A27_length_19579_cov_2.190025_AERISVIR428",
                                            "NODE_A7V_length_43811V27061_cov_2.352789_AERISVIR428",
                                            "NODE_A18_length_28470_cov_4.720518_AERISVIR089",
                                            "NODE_A2_length_61968_cov_1.784513_AERISVIR305")))

genome_seqs <- funct_annot_COI %>%
  select(seq_id, length, genome_label) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  arrange(seq_id)

gggenomes(genes = funct_annot_COI, seqs = genome_seqs) +
  geom_seq() + 
  geom_seq_label(aes(label = genome_label), size = 3, nudge_y = 0.4) + 
  geom_gene(aes(fill = fill_group), size = 8, stroke = 0.1, color = "#5A5156") + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = MyColorsPhrog, breaks = names(phrog_colors)) +
  geom_gene_tag(aes(label = vf_label, color = "#B40F20"),
                na.rm = TRUE, size = 2.5, angle = -20, nudge_y = -0.15, vjust = 1, hjust = 0) +
  geom_gene_tag(aes(label = moron_amg_label, color = "#C075A6"),
                na.rm = TRUE, size = 2.5,  angle = -20, nudge_y = -0.15, vjust = 1, hjust = 0) +
  scale_color_identity(guide = "none") +
  theme(legend.position = "right") +
  labs(fill = "PHROG Categories") 

```

### Figure 4e
```{r, fig.width = 5, fig.height = 4, fig.align = 'center'}
contigs_of_interest <- funct_annot %>%
  filter(funct == "virulence factor, DefenseFinder protein") %>%
  filter(Host_Genus == "Haemophilus") %>%
  distinct(seq_id) %>%
  pull(seq_id)

samples_with_hae_vf <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(CONTIGS %in% contigs_of_interest) %>%
  select(samples) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") %>%
  filter(mapped_reads > 0) %>%
  distinct(sample_ID) %>%
  pull(sample_ID)

abundance_bact <- Mastertable_bact %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("SRR"), names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads")

abundance_bact <- abundance_bact %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, Order, Family, Genus, .groups = "drop") %>%
  summarize(reads_by_genus = sum(mapped_reads)) %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  mutate(total_reads_in_sample = sum(reads_by_genus),
         rel_abund_by_genus = reads_by_genus/total_reads_in_sample*100)

abundance_bact <- merge(abundance_bact, SRAruntable, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "Run", all = TRUE)

abundance_bact <- abundance_bact %>%
  rename(Date_Visits = Collection_Date, PID = subjectID, SRR_ID = sample_ID)

abundance_bact <- merge(abundance_bact, metadata, 
                        by = c("Date_Visits", "PID"), all = FALSE)

samples_with_hae <- abundance_bact %>%
  filter(Genus == "Haemophilus") %>%
  filter(rel_abund_by_genus > 0) %>%
  pull(AERISVIR_Internal_ID)

data_plot <- abundance_bact %>%
  select(rel_abund_by_genus, Genus, AERISVIR_Internal_ID) %>%
  filter(Genus == "Haemophilus") %>%
  filter(AERISVIR_Internal_ID %in% samples_with_hae) %>%
  mutate(VF_presence = ifelse(AERISVIR_Internal_ID %in% samples_with_hae_vf, 
                              "Presence of\nHaemophilus-infecting\nphage(s) carrying VF/DF", 
                              "Absence of\nHaemophilus-infecting\nphage(s) carrying VF/DF"),
         VF_presence = factor(VF_presence, levels = c("Absence of\nHaemophilus-infecting\nphage(s) carrying VF/DF", "Presence of\nHaemophilus-infecting\nphage(s) carrying VF/DF")))

counts <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(VF_presence) %>%
  summarise(N = n_distinct(AERISVIR_Internal_ID))

x_labels <- setNames(paste0(levels(data_plot$VF_presence), "\nN = ", counts$N), levels(data_plot$VF_presence))

stat.test <- data_plot %>% 
  wilcox_test(rel_abund_by_genus ~ VF_presence) %>%
  add_significance() %>%
  add_xy_position(x = "VF_presence") %>%
  mutate(y.position = y.position + 5)

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = VF_presence, y = rel_abund_by_genus)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = VF_presence, fill = VF_presence), width = 0.5, alpha = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = VF_presence), width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 2, alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#8E8E8E","#B40F20")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#8E8E8E","#B40F20")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Relative abundance of\nHaemophilus bacteria (%)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none") +
  stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test, label = "p.signif", hide.ns = TRUE, tip.length = 0)
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
datatable(stat.test)
```

### Figure 4f
```{r, fig.width = 5, fig.height = 4, fig.align = 'center'}
contigs_of_interest <- funct_annot %>%
  filter(funct == "virulence factor, DefenseFinder protein") %>%
  filter(Host_Genus == "Haemophilus") %>%
  distinct(seq_id) %>%
  pull(seq_id)

samples_with_hae_vf <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(CONTIGS %in% contigs_of_interest) %>%
  select(samples) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") %>%
  filter(mapped_reads > 0) %>%
  distinct(sample_ID) %>%
  pull(sample_ID)

data_plot <- metadata %>%
  select(FEVPC, AERISVIR_Internal_ID) %>%
  filter(AERISVIR_Internal_ID %in% samples_with_hae) %>%
  filter(!is.na(FEVPC)) %>%
  mutate(VF_presence = ifelse(AERISVIR_Internal_ID %in% samples_with_hae_vf, 
                              "Presence of\nHaemophilus-infecting\nphage(s) carrying VF/DF", 
                              "Absence of\nHaemophilus-infecting\nphage(s) carrying VF/DF"),
         VF_presence = factor(VF_presence, levels = c("Absence of\nHaemophilus-infecting\nphage(s) carrying VF/DF", "Presence of\nHaemophilus-infecting\nphage(s) carrying VF/DF")))

counts <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(VF_presence) %>%
  summarise(N = n_distinct(AERISVIR_Internal_ID))

x_labels <- setNames(paste0(levels(data_plot$VF_presence), "\nN = ", counts$N), levels(data_plot$VF_presence))

stat.test <- data_plot %>% 
  wilcox_test(FEVPC ~ VF_presence) %>%
  add_significance() %>%
  add_xy_position(x = "VF_presence") %>%
  mutate(y.position = y.position + 5)

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = VF_presence, y = FEVPC)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = VF_presence, fill = VF_presence), width = 0.5, alpha = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = VF_presence), width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 2, alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#8E8E8E","#B40F20")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#8E8E8E","#B40F20")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) +
  labs(x = "", y = "FEV1 (% predicted)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none") +
  stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test, label = "p.signif", hide.ns = TRUE, tip.length = 0)
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
datatable(stat.test)
```

## Figure 5

### Figure 5a
```{r, fig.width = 15, fig.height = 6, fig.align = 'center'}
samples_with_reads <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(!Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  select(all_of(samples)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), sum, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  select_if(~ . > 0) %>%
  colnames()

abundances_TPM_pos_only <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  select(c("CONTIGS", "length"), all_of(samples_with_reads), all_of(grep("^Final", colnames(Mastertable_viral)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples_with_reads, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") 

abundances_TPM_pos_only$RPK <- abundances_TPM_pos_only$mapped_reads/abundances_TPM_pos_only$length

data_plot <- abundances_TPM_pos_only %>%
  filter(!Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, Final_FamilyN) %>%
  summarize(RPK = sum(RPK), .groups = 'drop')

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  mutate(RPK_total = sum(RPK),
         TPM = (RPK / RPK_total) * 10^6)

data_plot <- merge(data_plot, metadata, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(ExaSev = case_when(ExaSev == "Mild" ~ "MildModerate",
                            ExaSev == "Moderate" ~ "MildModerate",
                            ExaSev == "Severe" ~ "Severe",
                            is.na(ExaSev) ~ "No_exa"))

data_summary <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(PID, Exa_or_stable, Final_FamilyN, ExaSev) %>%
  summarize(mean_TPM_patient = mean(TPM), 
            n_per_PID = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Exa_or_stable, Final_FamilyN, ExaSev) %>%
  summarize(mean = mean(mean_TPM_patient),
            N_samples = sum(n_per_PID),
            N_patients = n(), .groups = "drop")

data_summary <- data_summary %>%
  mutate(Exa_or_stable = factor(Exa_or_stable, levels = c("Stable_state", "Exacerbated_state"))) %>%
  mutate(ExaSev = factor(ExaSev, levels = c("No_exa", "MildModerate", "Severe"))) %>%
  mutate(Exa_or_stable_ExaSev = interaction(Exa_or_stable, ExaSev, sep = "_"))

sample_size <- data_summary %>% 
  group_by(Exa_or_stable_ExaSev) %>% 
  summarise(N_samples = unique(N_samples), 
            N_patients = unique(N_patients), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(N = case_when(grepl("Exacerbated_state_MildModerate", Exa_or_stable_ExaSev) ~ paste0("Mild/Moderate Exacerbations\nN=", N_samples, "\n(", N_patients, " patients)"),
                       grepl("Exacerbated_state_Severe", Exa_or_stable_ExaSev) ~ paste0("Severe Exacerbations\nN=", N_samples, "\n(", N_patients, " patients)"),
                       grepl("Stable_state", Exa_or_stable_ExaSev) ~ paste0("Stable state\nN=", N_samples, "\n(", N_patients, " patients)")))

x_labels <- setNames(sample_size$N, sample_size$Exa_or_stable_ExaSev)

ggplot(data = data_summary, aes(x = Exa_or_stable_ExaSev, y = mean, fill = Final_FamilyN)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand=c(0,0)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Transcripts Per Kilobase Million (TPM)", fill = "Phage Family")  +
  scale_fill_manual(values=MyColorsPhageFamiliesN) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) + 
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 12))
```

### Figure 5b
```{r, fig.width = 12, fig.height = 6, fig.align = 'center'}
samples_with_reads <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(!Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  select(all_of(samples)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), sum, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  select_if(~ . > 0) %>%
  colnames()

abundances_TPM_pos_only <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(!Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  select(c("CONTIGS", "length", "replidec_lifestyle", "Final_Class"), all_of(samples_with_reads)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples_with_reads, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") 

abundances_TPM_pos_only$RPK <- abundances_TPM_pos_only$mapped_reads/abundances_TPM_pos_only$length

data_plot <- abundances_TPM_pos_only %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, Final_Class, replidec_lifestyle) %>%
  summarize(RPK = sum(RPK), .groups = 'drop')

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  mutate(RPK_total = sum(RPK),
         TPM = (RPK / RPK_total) * 10^6)

data_plot <- merge(data_plot, metadata, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(ExaSev = case_when(ExaSev == "Mild" ~ "MildModerate",
                            ExaSev == "Moderate" ~ "MildModerate",
                            ExaSev == "Severe" ~ "Severe",
                            is.na(ExaSev) ~ "No_exa"))

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(ExaSev = factor(ExaSev,
                         levels = c("No_exa", "MildModerate", "Severe"),
                         labels = c("No Exacerbation", "Mild/Moderate\nExacerbations", "Severe\nExacerbations")),
         replidec_lifestyle = factor(replidec_lifestyle,
                                     levels = c("Temperate", "Virulent", "Chronic"))) %>%
  filter(!Final_Class == "Unclassified viruses")

counts <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(ExaSev) %>%
  summarise(N = n_distinct(sample_ID))

x_labels <- setNames(paste0(levels(data_plot$ExaSev), "\nN = ", counts$N), levels(data_plot$ExaSev))

stat.test <- data_plot %>% 
  group_by(Final_Class, replidec_lifestyle) %>%
  wilcox_test(TPM ~ ExaSev, p.adjust.method = "holm", paired = FALSE) %>%
  add_y_position() %>%
  mutate(y.position = y.position - 200000)

ggplot(data_plot, (aes(x=ExaSev, y = TPM))) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = Final_Class, fill = Final_Class), width = 0.5, alpha = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Final_Class), width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 2, alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = MyColorsPhageClasses) +
  scale_color_manual(values = MyColorsPhageClasses) +
  labs(x = "", y = "TPM") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 12),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        strip.text.y.right = element_text(size = 10, margin = margin(l = 20)),
        strip.text.x.top = element_text(size = 12, margin = margin(b = 20)),
        panel.spacing = unit(1, "cm")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) +
  facet_grid(Final_Class ~ replidec_lifestyle, scales = "free_x") +
  stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test, label = "p.adj.signif", hide.ns = TRUE, tip.length = 0) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1000000), clip = "off")
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
datatable(stat.test)
```

## Figure 6

### Figure 6a
```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 5, fig.align = 'center'}
samples_with_reads <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  select(all_of(samples)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), sum, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  select_if(~ . > 0) %>%
  colnames()

abundances_TPM_pos_only <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  select(c("CONTIGS", "length"), all_of(samples_with_reads), all_of(grep("^Final", colnames(Mastertable_viral)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples_with_reads, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") 

abundances_TPM_pos_only$RPK <- abundances_TPM_pos_only$mapped_reads/abundances_TPM_pos_only$length

virome_profiles <- abundances_TPM_pos_only %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, Final_GenusN) %>%
  summarize(RPK = sum(RPK), .groups = 'drop')

virome_profiles <- virome_profiles %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  mutate(RPK_total = sum(RPK),
         TPM = (RPK / RPK_total) * 10^6)

virome_profiles <- virome_profiles %>%
  select(sample_ID, Final_GenusN, TPM) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Final_GenusN, values_from = TPM, values_fill = list(TPM = 0)) %>%
  column_to_rownames(var = "sample_ID")

bray_dist <- vegdist(virome_profiles, method = "bray")

pcoa_results <- cmdscale(bray_dist, k = 2, eig = TRUE, add = TRUE) 
pcoa_positions <- pcoa_results$points
colnames(pcoa_positions) <- c("PCoA1", "PCoA2")

pcoa_positions <- pcoa_positions %>%
  as_tibble(rownames = "sample_ID")

percent_explained <- 100 * pcoa_results$eig / sum(pcoa_results$eig)

data_plot <- merge(pcoa_positions, metadata, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(Exa_or_stable = factor(Exa_or_stable, levels = c("Stable_state", "Exacerbated_state"),
                                labels = c("Stable state", "Exacerbations")))

label_axis <- c(paste0("PCo1 (", sprintf("%.1f", percent_explained[1]), "%)"), 
                paste0("PCo2 (", sprintf("%.1f", percent_explained[2]), "%)"))

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x=PCoA1, y=PCoA2, color = CURRCOPD, shape = Exa_or_stable)) + 
  geom_point(size = 3) +
    stat_ellipse(aes(x = PCoA1, y = PCoA2, color = CURRCOPD), level = 0.95, show.legend = FALSE, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  labs(x = label_axis[1], y=label_axis[2], color = "COPD severity", shape = "COPD status") + 
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = MyColorsSeverity)

permanova_results <- adonis2(bray_dist ~ CURRCOPD + Exa_or_stable, data = data_plot)
```
PERMANOVA statistics on COPD subgroups (disease severity + disease status)
```{r}
print(permanova_results)
```
Adujsted p-values
```{r}
p.adjust(permanova_results$`Pr(>F)`[1], method = "holm")
```

### Figure 6b
```{r, fig.width = 9, fig.height = 5, fig.align = 'center'}
clinical_covariate <- metadata %>%
  filter(AERISVIR_Internal_ID %in% samples_with_reads) %>%
  select(AERISVIR_Internal_ID, PID, Exa_or_stable, Season, FEVPC, FEV1FVCO, AGE, Gender, NBEXAT, NBPREVEXA, EXATypeDescPCR_EOSBLD2) %>%
  mutate(PID = factor(PID), Exa_or_stable = factor(Exa_or_stable), Season = factor(Season), Gender = factor(Gender), EXATypeDescPCR_EOSBLD2 = factor(EXATypeDescPCR_EOSBLD2)) %>%
  {
    na_percent <- sapply(., function(x) mean(is.na(x))) * 100
    cols_to_remove <- names(na_percent[na_percent > 10])
    . <- .[, !names(.) %in% cols_to_remove]
    
    unique_counts <- sapply(., function(x) length(unique(na.omit(x))))
    cols_single_unique <- names(unique_counts[unique_counts == 1])
    . <- .[, !names(.) %in% cols_single_unique]
    .
  } %>%
  na.omit() %>%
  arrange(match(AERISVIR_Internal_ID, rownames(virome_profiles))) %>%
  column_to_rownames(var = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID") %>%
  rename("Patient ID" = PID, 
         "Trigger profile (B, V, E, Mixed, None)" = EXATypeDescPCR_EOSBLD2, 
         "FEV1 (% predicted)" = FEVPC, 
         "Nb of exacerbations during study" = NBEXAT,
         "Nb of exacerbations year before study" = NBPREVEXA,
         "FEV1/FVC" = FEV1FVCO,
         "Disease status (Stable or Exacerbated)" = Exa_or_stable,
         "Age" = AGE,
         "Collection Season" = Season)


#Functions are copied from https://github.com/raeslab/RLdbRDA/tree/main
get_r2_single <- function(distmat, meta, feature) {
  capsc <- capscale(distmat ~ meta[, feature])
  an <- anova.cca(capsc)
  
  Fa <- an["F"][[1]][[1]]
  r2 <- RsquareAdj(capsc)[[1]]
  r2adj <- RsquareAdj(capsc)[[2]]
  N <- nrow(na.exclude(meta[,feature,drop=FALSE]))
  pval <- an["Pr(>F)"][[1]][[1]]
  
  output <- cbind(feature, Fa, r2, r2adj, N, pval)
  
  return(output)
}

get_r2 <- function(distmat, meta) {
  features = colnames(meta)
  
  all <- c()
  
  for (feature in features){
    es <- get_r2_single(distmat, meta, feature)
    all <- rbind(all, es)
  }
  
  all <- data.frame(all)
  all$padj <- p.adjust(all$pval, method="holm")
  
  rownames(all) <- all$feature
  
  return(all)
}

get_cumul <- function(distmat, meta) {
  mod0=capscale(distmat ~ 1) #H0: unconstrained ordination
  mod1=capscale(distmat ~ ., data=meta) #H1: full constrained ordination, all metadata
  
  
  attach(meta)
  
  step.res<-ordiR2step(mod0, scope=formula(mod1), data=meta ,direction="forward", Pin = 1, R2scope = TRUE, pstep = 100, perm.max = 999, permutations=9999, trace = F) #forward stepwise dbRDA
  res=step.res$anova
  
  
  row.names(res)=gsub(pattern="\\+ ", "",row.names(res))
  rownames(res) <- gsub(pattern = "`", "", rownames(res))
  colnames(res)=gsub(pattern="Pr\\(>F\\)", "pval", colnames(res)) # replace column name
  colnames(res)=paste0("RDAcumul_",colnames(res))
  res[,"RDAcumul_N"]=nrow(meta)
  
  detach(meta)
  
  
  return(res)
}

combine_data <- function(r2, cumul){
  
  all=data.frame(merge(r2,cumul,by="row.names",all=T),row.names=1)
  all=all[order(all$r2,decreasing=TRUE),]
  all=all[order(all$RDAcumul_R2.adj),]
  
  return(all)
}

prepare_plot_data <- function(dbrda_data) {
  # Define the order of the y-axis
  plot_order = rev(row.names(dbrda_data))
  
  # Impute missing values in RDAcumul_R2.adj with the largest non-NA value
  insignificant_features <- row.names(dbrda_data)[is.na(dbrda_data$RDAcumul_R2.adj)]
  max_val <- max(dbrda_data$RDAcumul_R2.adj, na.rm = TRUE)
  dbrda_data$RDAcumul_R2.adj[is.na(dbrda_data$RDAcumul_R2.adj)] <- max_val
  
  # Filter the data and reshape it to long form
  plot_data = dbrda_data %>%
    filter(row.names(dbrda_data) != "<All variables>") %>%
    select(r2adj, RDAcumul_R2.adj) %>%
    mutate(r2adj = as.numeric(r2adj)) %>%
    rownames_to_column(var = "rowname") %>%
    pivot_longer(-rowname, names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>%
    mutate(significant = ifelse(rowname %in% insignificant_features, 0, 1))
  
  plot_data$rowname <- factor(plot_data$rowname, levels = plot_order)
  
  return(plot_data)
}

bray_mat <- as.matrix(bray_dist)
bray_mat_clean <- bray_mat[rownames(clinical_covariate), rownames(clinical_covariate)]
bray_dist_clean <- as.dist(bray_mat_clean)

r2 <- get_r2(bray_dist_clean, clinical_covariate)

sign_r2 <- rownames(r2[which(r2$padj < 0.05),])

cumul <- get_cumul(bray_dist_clean, clinical_covariate[, sign_r2, drop=F])

out <- combine_data(r2, cumul)

plot_data <- prepare_plot_data(out)

ggplot(data = plot_data, aes(x = value, y = rowname, fill = variable)) +
  geom_bar(aes(alpha = significant), stat = 'identity', position = position_dodge2()) +
  theme_minimal() +
  xlab('Effect size') +
  ylab('Features') +
  labs(fill = "") + 
  guides(alpha="none") + 
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#D8B70A", "#02401B"),
                    labels=c(bquote(R^2), bquote('Cumulative' ~ R^2))) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(0, 0.02, 0.04, 0.44, 0.46, 0.48),
    labels = c("0", "0.02", "0.04", "0.44", "0.46", "0.48")
  ) +
  scale_x_break(c(0.04, 0.43), symbol = c("//"), space = 0.2) +
  scale_alpha_continuous(range = c(0.5, 1), limits = c(0, 1))
```

### Figure 6c
```{r, fig.width = 14, fig.height = 5, fig.align = 'center'}
bray_matrix <- as.matrix(bray_dist)

metadata_subset <- metadata %>%
  filter(AERISVIR_Internal_ID %in% rownames(bray_matrix)) %>%
  select(AERISVIR_Internal_ID, PID, Date_Visits, Exa_or_stable)

distance_df <- as.data.frame(as.matrix(bray_dist))
distance_df$sample_i <- rownames(distance_df)
distance_df <- gather(distance_df, "sample_j", "distance", -sample_i)

data_plot <- distance_df %>%
  left_join(metadata_subset, by = c("sample_i" = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID")) %>%
  rename(PID_i = PID, Date_i = Date_Visits, Exa_or_stable_i = Exa_or_stable) %>%
  left_join(metadata_subset, by = c("sample_j" = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID")) %>%
  rename(PID_j = PID, Date_j = Date_Visits, Exa_or_stable_j = Exa_or_stable) %>%
  filter(!sample_i == sample_j) %>%
  mutate(within_or_between = ifelse(PID_i == PID_j, "Within Subjects", "Between Subjects"),
         TP_COMP = case_when(
           Exa_or_stable_i == "Exacerbated_state" & Exa_or_stable_j == "Exacerbated_state" ~ "EXA-EXA",
           Exa_or_stable_i == "Exacerbated_state" & Exa_or_stable_j == "Stable_state" ~ "STABLE-EXA",
           Exa_or_stable_i == "Stable_state" & Exa_or_stable_j == "Exacerbated_state" ~ "STABLE-EXA",
           Exa_or_stable_i == "Stable_state" & Exa_or_stable_j == "Stable_state" ~ "STABLE-STABLE")) %>%
  mutate(within_or_between = factor(within_or_between, levels = c("Within Subjects", "Between Subjects")),
         TP_COMP = factor(TP_COMP, levels = c("STABLE-STABLE", "STABLE-EXA", "EXA-EXA")),
         within_or_between_TP_COMP = interaction(within_or_between, TP_COMP, sep = "_", lex.order = TRUE)) 

sample_size <- data_plot %>% 
  group_by(within_or_between_TP_COMP) %>% 
  summarise(N_samples = n_distinct(sample_i)) %>%
  mutate(N = case_when(grepl("STABLE-STABLE", within_or_between_TP_COMP) ~ paste0("STABLE-STABLE\nN=", N_samples),
                       grepl("STABLE-EXA", within_or_between_TP_COMP) ~ paste0("STABLE-EXA\nN=", N_samples),
                       grepl("EXA-EXA", within_or_between_TP_COMP) ~ paste0("EXA-EXA\nN=", N_samples)))

x_labels <- setNames(sample_size$N, sample_size$within_or_between_TP_COMP)

anova <- aov(distance ~ within_or_between_TP_COMP, data = data_plot)
stat.test <- tukey_hsd(anova) 

y_start <- max(data_plot$distance, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05
y_step  <- max(data_plot$distance, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.05

stat.test <- stat.test %>%
  filter(!(group1 == "Within Subjects_STABLE-STABLE" & group2 == "Between Subjects_STABLE-EXA")) %>%
  filter(!(group1 == "Within Subjects_STABLE-STABLE" & group2 == "Between Subjects_EXA-EXA")) %>%
  filter(!(group1 == "Within Subjects_STABLE-EXA" & group2 == "Between Subjects_STABLE-STABLE")) %>%
  filter(!(group1 == "Within Subjects_STABLE-EXA" & group2 == "Between Subjects_EXA-EXA")) %>%
  filter(!(group1 == "Within Subjects_EXA-EXA" & group2 == "Between Subjects_STABLE-STABLE")) %>%
  filter(!(group1 == "Within Subjects_EXA-EXA" & group2 == "Between Subjects_STABLE-EXA")) %>%
  arrange(p.adj) %>%
  mutate(y.position = y_start + (row_number() - 1) * y_step)

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = within_or_between_TP_COMP, y = distance)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = TP_COMP, fill = TP_COMP), alpha = 0.4) +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Bray-Curtis distance") +
  scale_color_manual(values = wes_palette("Moonrise3")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wes_palette("Moonrise3")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.3, margin = margin(r = 10)),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.margin = margin(40, 0, 0, 10)) +
  stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test, label = "p.adj.signif", hide.ns = TRUE, tip.length = 0) +
  annotate("text", x = 2, y = Inf, label = "Within Subjects", vjust = -1, size = 5) +
  annotate("text", x = 5, y = Inf, label = "Between Subjects", vjust = -1, size = 5) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")
```
```{r echo=FALSE}
datatable(stat.test)
```

## Figure 7
```{r, fig.width = 9, fig.height = 10, fig.align = 'center'}
samples_with_reads <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(!Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  select(all_of(samples)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), sum, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  select_if(~ . > 0) %>%
  colnames()

abundances_TPM <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  select(c("CONTIGS", "length"), all_of(samples_with_reads), all_of(grep("^Final", colnames(Mastertable_viral)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples_with_reads, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") 

abundances_TPM$RPK <- abundances_TPM$mapped_reads/abundances_TPM$length

data_plot <- abundances_TPM %>%
  filter(!Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, Final_FamilyN) %>%
  summarize(RPK = sum(RPK), .groups = "drop")

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  mutate(RPK_total = sum(RPK),
         TPM = (RPK / RPK_total) * 10^6)

data_plot <- merge(data_plot, metadata, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

PID_near_complete <- metadata %>% 
  filter(AERISVIR_Internal_ID %in% samples_with_reads) %>%
  group_by(PID) %>% 
  summarize(N = n()) %>% 
  filter (N >= 6) %>% 
  pull(PID)

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  filter(PID %in% PID_near_complete) %>%
  filter(TPM > 0) %>%
  arrange(PID, Date_Visits) %>%
  group_by(PID) %>%
  mutate(sample_ID = factor(sample_ID, levels = unique(sample_ID))) %>%
  ungroup()

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(PID = factor(PID, levels = 1:151)) %>%
  mutate(AAI_number = str_extract(Final_FamilyN, "(?<=FamilyAAI_)\\d+"))

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = sample_ID, y = TPM, fill = Final_FamilyN)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = AAI_number), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 2, color = "black")+
  labs(x = "", y = "Transcripts Per Kilobase Million (TPM)", fill = "Viral Family")  +
  scale_fill_manual(values= MyColorsPhageFamiliesN, 
                    guide = guide_legend(ncol = 1), drop = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 5, margin = margin(r = -2)),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.direction = "vertical",
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) +
  geom_text(aes(x = sample_ID, y = -50000, 
                label = ifelse(Exa_or_stable == "Exacerbated_state", EXATypeDescPCR_EOSBLD2, "")), 
            size = 1.5, color = "#BD3027") +
  expand_limits(y = -50000) +
  facet_wrap(~PID, scales = "free", nrow = 5)

```

## Figure 8

### Figure 8a
```{r, fig.width = 9, fig.height = 11, fig.align = 'center'}
samples_with_reads <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(Final_Family == "Anelloviridae") %>%
  select(all_of(samples)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), sum, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  select_if(~ . > 0) %>%
  colnames()

abundances_TPM <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  select(c("CONTIGS", "length"), all_of(samples_with_reads), all_of(grep("^Final", colnames(Mastertable_viral)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples_with_reads, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") 

abundances_TPM$RPK <- abundances_TPM$mapped_reads/abundances_TPM$length

data_plot <- abundances_TPM %>%
  filter(Final_Family == "Anelloviridae") %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, Final_GenusN) %>%
  summarize(RPK = sum(RPK), .groups = "drop")

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  mutate(RPK_total = sum(RPK),
         TPM = (RPK / RPK_total) * 10^6)

data_plot <- merge(data_plot, metadata, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

PID_near_complete <- metadata %>% 
  filter(AERISVIR_Internal_ID %in% samples_with_reads) %>%
  group_by(PID) %>% 
  summarize(N = n()) %>% 
  filter (N >= 6) %>% 
  pull(PID)

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  filter(PID %in% PID_near_complete) %>%
  filter(TPM > 0) %>%
  arrange(PID, Date_Visits) %>%
  group_by(PID) %>%
  mutate(sample_ID = factor(sample_ID, levels = unique(sample_ID))) %>%
  ungroup()

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(PID = factor(PID, levels = 1:151))

virome_profiles <- data_plot %>%
  select(sample_ID, Final_GenusN, TPM) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Final_GenusN, values_from = TPM, values_fill = list(TPM = 0)) %>%
  column_to_rownames(var = "sample_ID")

virome_profiles_hell <- decostand(virome_profiles, "hellinger")
bray_dist <- vegdist(virome_profiles_hell, method = "bray")

bray_matrix <- as.matrix(bray_dist)

metadata_ordered <- metadata %>%
  filter(AERISVIR_Internal_ID %in% rownames(bray_matrix)) %>%
  arrange(PID, Date_Visits) %>%
  select(AERISVIR_Internal_ID, PID, Date_Visits, Exa_or_stable, EXATypeDescPCR_EOSBLD2)

distance_df <- as.data.frame(as.matrix(bray_dist))
distance_df$sample_i <- rownames(distance_df)
distance_df <- gather(distance_df, "sample_j", "distance", -sample_i)

distance_df <- distance_df %>%
  left_join(metadata_ordered[c("AERISVIR_Internal_ID", "PID", "Date_Visits")], by = c("sample_i" = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID")) %>%
  rename(PID_i = PID, Date_i = Date_Visits) %>%
  left_join(metadata_ordered, by = c("sample_j" = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID")) %>%
  rename(PID_j = PID, Date_j = Date_Visits) %>%
  filter(!(sample_i == sample_j)) %>%
  filter(PID_i == PID_j) %>%
  select(-PID_j) %>%
  rename(PID = PID_i) %>%
  mutate(PID = factor(PID, levels = 1:151))

bray_median <- distance_df %>%
  group_by(PID, sample_j, Date_j) %>%
  summarize(median_bray = median(distance), .groups = "drop") %>%
  rename(sample_ID = sample_j)

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  left_join(bray_median, by = c("PID", "sample_ID"))

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = sample_ID, y = TPM, fill = Final_GenusN)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  geom_line(aes(y = median_bray * 10^6, group = 1), color = "black", size = 0.4) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Transcripts Per Kilobase Million (TPM)", fill = "Anelloviridae Genera")  +
  scale_fill_manual(values= MyColorsAnello) +
  scale_y_continuous(sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . / 10^6, 
                                         name = "Median Bray-Curtis distance to other samples within patient",
                                         breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1),
                                         labels = c("0", "0.5", "1"))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y.left = element_text(size = 5, margin = margin(r = -2)),
        axis.text.y.right = element_text(size = 5, margin = margin(l = -2)),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.spacing = unit(0.2, "cm")) +
  geom_text(aes(x = sample_ID, y = -50000, 
                label = ifelse(Exa_or_stable == "Exacerbated_state", EXATypeDescPCR_EOSBLD2, "")), 
            size = 1.5, color = "#BD3027") +
  expand_limits(y = -50000) +
  facet_wrap(~PID, scales = "free", ncol = 4)
```

### Figure 8b
```{r, fig.width = 15, fig.height = 4, fig.align = 'center'}
bray_matrix <- as.matrix(bray_dist)

metadata_subset <- metadata %>%
  filter(AERISVIR_Internal_ID %in% rownames(bray_matrix)) %>%
  select(AERISVIR_Internal_ID, PID, Date_Visits, Exa_or_stable)

distance_df <- as.data.frame(as.matrix(bray_dist))
distance_df$sample_i <- rownames(distance_df)
distance_df <- gather(distance_df, "sample_j", "distance", -sample_i)

data_plot <- distance_df %>%
  left_join(metadata_subset, by = c("sample_i" = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID")) %>%
  rename(PID_i = PID, Date_i = Date_Visits, Exa_or_stable_i = Exa_or_stable) %>%
  left_join(metadata_subset, by = c("sample_j" = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID")) %>%
  rename(PID_j = PID, Date_j = Date_Visits, Exa_or_stable_j = Exa_or_stable) %>%
  filter(!sample_i == sample_j) %>%
  mutate(within_or_between = ifelse(PID_i == PID_j, "Within Subjects", "Between Subjects"),
         TP_COMP = case_when(
           Exa_or_stable_i == "Exacerbated_state" & Exa_or_stable_j == "Exacerbated_state" ~ "EXA-EXA",
           Exa_or_stable_i == "Exacerbated_state" & Exa_or_stable_j == "Stable_state" ~ "STABLE-EXA",
           Exa_or_stable_i == "Stable_state" & Exa_or_stable_j == "Exacerbated_state" ~ "STABLE-EXA",
           Exa_or_stable_i == "Stable_state" & Exa_or_stable_j == "Stable_state" ~ "STABLE-STABLE")) %>%
  mutate(within_or_between = factor(within_or_between, levels = c("Within Subjects", "Between Subjects")),
         TP_COMP = factor(TP_COMP, levels = c("STABLE-STABLE", "STABLE-EXA", "EXA-EXA")),
         within_or_between_TP_COMP = interaction(within_or_between, TP_COMP, sep = "_", lex.order = TRUE)) 

sample_size <- data_plot %>% 
  group_by(within_or_between_TP_COMP) %>% 
  summarise(N_samples = n_distinct(sample_i)) %>%
  mutate(N = case_when(grepl("STABLE-STABLE", within_or_between_TP_COMP) ~ paste0("STABLE-STABLE\nN=", N_samples),
                       grepl("STABLE-EXA", within_or_between_TP_COMP) ~ paste0("STABLE-EXA\nN=", N_samples),
                       grepl("EXA-EXA", within_or_between_TP_COMP) ~ paste0("EXA-EXA\nN=", N_samples)))

x_labels <- setNames(sample_size$N, sample_size$within_or_between_TP_COMP)

anova <- aov(distance ~ within_or_between_TP_COMP, data = data_plot)
stat.test <- tukey_hsd(anova) 

y_start <- max(data_plot$distance, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05
y_step  <- max(data_plot$distance, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.05

stat.test <- stat.test %>%
  filter(!(group1 == "Within Subjects_STABLE-STABLE" & group2 == "Between Subjects_STABLE-EXA")) %>%
  filter(!(group1 == "Within Subjects_STABLE-STABLE" & group2 == "Between Subjects_EXA-EXA")) %>%
  filter(!(group1 == "Within Subjects_STABLE-EXA" & group2 == "Between Subjects_STABLE-STABLE")) %>%
  filter(!(group1 == "Within Subjects_STABLE-EXA" & group2 == "Between Subjects_EXA-EXA")) %>%
  filter(!(group1 == "Within Subjects_EXA-EXA" & group2 == "Between Subjects_STABLE-STABLE")) %>%
  filter(!(group1 == "Within Subjects_EXA-EXA" & group2 == "Between Subjects_STABLE-EXA")) %>%
  arrange(p.adj) %>%
  mutate(y.position = y_start + (row_number() - 1) * y_step)

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = within_or_between_TP_COMP, y = distance)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = TP_COMP, fill = TP_COMP), alpha = 0.4) +
  labs(x = "",
       y = "Bray-Curtis distance") +
  scale_color_manual(values = wes_palette("Moonrise3")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wes_palette("Moonrise3")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.3, margin = margin(r = 10)),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.margin = margin(40, 0, 0, 10)) +
  stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test, label = "p.adj.signif", hide.ns = TRUE, tip.length = 0) +
  annotate("text", x = 2, y = Inf, label = "Within Subjects", vjust = -1, size = 5) +
  annotate("text", x = 5, y = Inf, label = "Between Subjects", vjust = -1, size = 5) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")
```

```{r echo=FALSE}
datatable(stat.test)
```

# Supplementary Material

## Figure S1
```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 12, fig.align = 'center'}
data_plot <- metadata %>%
  filter(Sample_or_Control == "Sample") %>%
  mutate(PID = factor(PID, levels = 1:151),
         Exa_or_stable = factor(Exa_or_stable, levels = c("Stable_state", "Exacerbated_state"),
                                labels = c("Stable state", "Exacerbations"))) %>%
  group_by(PID, Exa_or_stable, YearMonth) %>%
  mutate(multiple_sampling = ifelse(n() > 1, "*", ""))
         

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = YearMonth, y = PID)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = Exa_or_stable), color = NA) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Stable state" = wes_palette("FrenchDispatch")[1], 
                               "Exacerbations" = NA), 
                    na.value = NA, breaks = "Stable state",  labels = "Stable state") +
  geom_tile(aes(color = Exa_or_stable), fill = NA, linewidth = 0.3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Exacerbations" = wes_palette("FrenchDispatch")[2], 
                                "Stable state" = NA), 
                     na.value = NA, breaks = "Exacerbations",  labels = "Exacerbations") +
  labs(x = "Collection Timepoint (YYYY-MM)", y = "Patient ID", fill = "", color = "") +
  new_scale_color() + 
  geom_point(aes(shape = multiple_sampling, color = Exa_or_stable), size = 1, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(32,3)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Stable state" = "#2E766D", "Exacerbations" = "#BD3027")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 12)),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(linewidth = 0.3),
        legend.position = "right") +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(3.5, 9.5, 15.5, 21.5), color = "black", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3)  
```

## Figure S2
````{r, fig.width = 8, fig.height = 11, fig.align = 'center'}
samples_with_reads <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  select(all_of(samples)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), sum, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  select_if(~ . > 0) %>%
  colnames()

abundances_TPM_pos_only <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  select(c("CONTIGS", "length"), all_of(samples_with_reads), all_of(grep("^Final", colnames(Mastertable_viral)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples_with_reads, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") 

abundances_TPM_pos_only$RPK <- abundances_TPM_pos_only$mapped_reads/abundances_TPM_pos_only$length

data_plot <- abundances_TPM_pos_only %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, Final_Family, Final_Species) %>%
  summarize(RPK = sum(RPK))

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  mutate(RPK_total = sum(RPK),
         TPM = (RPK / RPK_total) * 10^6)

data_plot <- merge(data_plot, metadata, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(Exa_or_stable) %>%
  mutate(
    facet_group = case_when(
      Exa_or_stable == "Exacerbated_state" ~ "Exacerbated_state",
      Exa_or_stable == "Stable_state" & row_number() <= n()/2 ~ "Stable_state_A",
      Exa_or_stable == "Stable_state" ~ "Stable_state_B"))

facet_names <- c(
  Exacerbated_state = "Exacerbations",
  Stable_state_A = "Stable state",
  Stable_state_B = "Stable state")

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = TPM, y = sample_ID, fill = Final_Family)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  labs(x = "Transcripts Per Kilobase Million (TPM)", y = "", fill = "Viral Family")  +
  scale_fill_manual(values=MyColorsViralFamilies, guide = guide_legend(ncol = 1)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 5),
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10)),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 5, margin = margin(r = -2)),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.direction = "vertical",
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "cm")) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev) +
  facet_wrap(~ facet_group, scales = "free", 
             labeller = labeller(facet_group = facet_names))
````

## Figure S3
````{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 10, fig.align = 'center'}
samples_with_reads <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  select(all_of(samples)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), sum, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  select_if(~ . > 0) %>%
  colnames()

abundances_TPM_pos_only <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  select(c("CONTIGS", "length"), all_of(samples_with_reads), all_of(grep("^Final", colnames(Mastertable_viral)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples_with_reads, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") 

abundances_TPM_pos_only$RPK <- abundances_TPM_pos_only$mapped_reads/abundances_TPM_pos_only$length

data_plot <- abundances_TPM_pos_only %>%
  filter(Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, Final_Family) %>%
  summarize(RPK = sum(RPK), .groups = 'drop')

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  mutate(RPK_total = sum(RPK),
         TPM = (RPK / RPK_total) * 10^6)

data_plot <- merge(data_plot, metadata, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(Exa_or_stable = case_when(
    Exa_or_stable == "Stable_state" ~ "Stable state",
    Exa_or_stable == "Exacerbated_state" & EXAViral == "1" ~ "Viral\nexacerbations",
    Exa_or_stable == "Exacerbated_state" & EXAViral == "0" ~ "Non-viral\nexacerbations",
    Exa_or_stable == "Exacerbated_state" & is.na(EXAViral) ~ "Non-viral\nexacerbations")) %>%
  mutate(Exa_or_stable = factor(Exa_or_stable, levels = c("Stable state", "Viral\nexacerbations", "Non-viral\nexacerbations")))

counts <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(Exa_or_stable) %>%
  summarise(N = n_distinct(sample_ID))

x_labels <- setNames(paste0(levels(data_plot$Exa_or_stable), "\nN = ", counts$N), levels(data_plot$Exa_or_stable))

excl_stat <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(Final_Family, Exa_or_stable) %>%
  summarize(var = n_distinct(TPM), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Final_Family) %>%
  summarise(n_var = sum(var == 1), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(n_var >= 2) %>%
  pull(Final_Family)

stat.test <- data_plot %>% 
  filter(!Final_Family %in% excl_stat) %>%
  group_by(Final_Family) %>%
  wilcox_test(TPM ~ Exa_or_stable, p.adjust.method = "holm", paired = FALSE) %>%
  add_y_position()

ggplot(data_plot, (aes(x=Exa_or_stable, y = TPM))) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = Final_Family, fill = Final_Family), width = 0.5, alpha = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Final_Family), width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 2, alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = MyColorsViralFamilies) +
  scale_color_manual(values = MyColorsViralFamilies) +
  labs(x = "", y = "TPM") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 6),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        strip.text = element_text(size = 9, margin = margin(b = 25, t = 10))) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  facet_wrap(~Final_Family, scales = "free_x", strip.position = "top", nrow = 8) +
  stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test, label = "p.adj.signif", hide.ns = TRUE, tip.length = 0) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1000000), clip = "off")
````

## Figure S4

### Figure S4a
````{r, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 5, fig.align = 'center'}
respi_patho_families <- c("Adenoviridae", "Coronaviridae", "Orthomyxoviridae", "Paramyxoviridae", "Picornaviridae", "Pneumoviridae", "Parvoviridae")

data_plot <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  select(all_of(c(samples, "Final_Family", "Final_Species"))) %>%
  filter(Final_Family %in% respi_patho_families) %>%
  filter(!Final_Species == "Protoparvovirus primate3") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples, names_to = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") %>%
  group_by(AERISVIR_Internal_ID, Final_Species) %>%
  summarize(total_reads = sum(mapped_reads), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Final_Species, values_from = total_reads, values_fill = 0)

data_plot <- merge(data_plot, (metadata %>% select(AERISVIR_Internal_ID, 25:41)), by = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

ngs_positive_samples <- data_plot %>%
  filter(rowSums(select(., -AERISVIR_Internal_ID, -starts_with("PCR_"))) > 0) %>%
  pull(AERISVIR_Internal_ID)

pcr_positive_samples <- data_plot %>%
  filter(if_any(starts_with("PCR_"), ~ .x == 1)) %>%
  pull(AERISVIR_Internal_ID)

virus_detection <- list(
  "Adenovirus" = list(ngs = "Human mastadenovirus B", pcr = "PCR_ADEDNA"),
  "Human bocavirus" = list(ngs = "Unclassified Bocaparvovirus", pcr = "PCR_HBODNA"),
  "Human coronavirus OC43" = list(ngs = "Betacoronavirus 1", pcr = "PCR_CO1RNA"),
  "Human coronavirus 229E" = list(ngs = "Human coronavirus 229E", pcr = "PCR_CO2RNA"),
  "Human coronavirus NL63" = list(ngs = "Human coronavirus NL63", pcr = "PCR_CO3RNA"),
  "Human coronavirus HKU1" = list(ngs = "Human coronavirus HKU1", pcr = "PCR_CO4RNA"),
  "Human metapneumovirus" = list(ngs = "Metapneumovirus hominis", pcr = "PCR_HMVRNA"),
  "Influenza A virus" = list(pcr = "PCR_FLUB1"),
  "Influenza B virus" = list(ngs = "Betainfluenzavirus influenzae", pcr = "PCR_FLUB2"),
  "Human parainfluenza virus 1" = list(pcr = "PCR_PIV.1"),
  "Human parainfluenza virus 2" = list(pcr = "PCR_PIV.2"),
  "Human parainfluenza virus 3" = list(ngs = "Respirovirus pneumoniae", pcr = "PCR_PIV.3"),
  "Human parainfluenza virus 4" = list(ngs = "Orthorubulavirus hominis", pcr = "PCR_PIV.4"),
  "Human respiratory syncytial virus" = list(ngs = c("Orthopneumovirus hominis", "Unclassified Orthopneumovirus"), pcr = "PCR_RSV01"),
  "Rhinovirus + Enterovirus" = list(ngs = c("Rhinovirus A", "Rhinovirus B", "Rhinovirus C"), pcr = "PCR_ERRNA")
)

data_summary <- data.frame(
  Virus = names(virus_detection),
  Both_PCR_NGS = integer(length(virus_detection)),
  PCR_only = integer(length(virus_detection)),
  NGS_only = integer(length(virus_detection)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (i in 1:nrow(data_summary)) {
  virus <- data_summary$Virus[i]
  ngs_cols <- virus_detection[[virus]]$ngs
  pcr_cols <- virus_detection[[virus]]$pcr
  
  data_plot <- data_plot %>%
    mutate(NGS_total = rowSums(select(., all_of(ngs_cols)), na.rm = TRUE))
  
  data_summary$Both_PCR_NGS[i] <-
    sum(data_plot$NGS_total > 0 & data_plot[[pcr_cols]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  data_summary$PCR_only[i] <-
    sum(data_plot$NGS_total == 0 & data_plot[[pcr_cols]] == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  data_summary$NGS_only[i] <-
    sum(data_plot$NGS_total > 0 & data_plot[[pcr_cols]] == 0, na.rm = TRUE)}

data_summary <- data_summary %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Both_PCR_NGS, PCR_only, NGS_only), 
               names_to = "Method", values_to = "Count") %>%
  filter(Count > 0) %>%
  mutate(Method = factor(Method, levels = c("Both_PCR_NGS", "PCR_only", "NGS_only"),
                         labels = c("PCR and NGS\ndetected", "PCR detected\nonly", "NGS detected\nonly")))

data_summary <- data_summary %>%
  mutate(Virus = factor(Virus, levels = c("Adenovirus", "Human coronavirus OC43", "Human coronavirus HKU1", "Human coronavirus 229E", "Human coronavirus NL63", "Influenza A virus", "Influenza B virus", "Human parainfluenza virus 1", "Human parainfluenza virus 2", "Human parainfluenza virus 3", "Human parainfluenza virus 4", "Human bocavirus", "Rhinovirus + Enterovirus", "Human metapneumovirus", "Human respiratory syncytial virus")))
         
ggballoonplot(data_summary, x = "Method", y = "Virus", size = "Count", 
              fill = "Virus", color = "Virus", size.range = c(3, 10)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = Count), hjust = -1.5, vjust = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = MyColorsRespiPathoSpecies) +
  scale_color_manual(values = MyColorsRespiPathoSpecies) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev) +
  scale_x_discrete(position = "top") +
  guides(size = "none") +
  labs(x = "", y = "") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank())
````

### Figure S4b
````{r, fig.align = 'center'}
abundances_TPM <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  select(c("CONTIGS", "length"), all_of(samples), all_of(grep("^Final", colnames(Mastertable_viral)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") 

abundances_TPM$RPK <- abundances_TPM$mapped_reads/abundances_TPM$length

abundances_TPM <- abundances_TPM %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  mutate(RPK_total = sum(RPK),
         TPM = (RPK / RPK_total) * 10^6)

abundances_TPM$TPM[is.nan(abundances_TPM$TPM)] <- 0

abundances_TPM <- abundances_TPM %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, Final_Genus) %>%
  summarize(TPM_RHV = sum(TPM)) %>%
  filter(Final_Genus == "Enterovirus")

abundances_TPM <- merge(abundances_TPM, metadata[c("AERISVIR_Internal_ID", "QPCR_RHVRNALD", "PCR_ERRNA")], by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

data_plot <- abundances_TPM %>%
  mutate(QPCR_RHVRNALD = ifelse(PCR_ERRNA == 0 & is.na(QPCR_RHVRNALD), 0, QPCR_RHVRNALD)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(QPCR_RHVRNALD)) %>%
  mutate(QPCR_RHVRNALD = QPCR_RHVRNALD + 1)

cor_test <- cor.test(data_plot$TPM_RHV, data_plot$QPCR_RHVRNALD, method = "pearson", use = pairwise.complete.obs)
r <- round(cor_test$estimate, 3)
p_value <- ifelse(cor_test$p.value < 0.001, "< 0.001", paste0("= ", round(cor_test$p.value, 3)))

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = QPCR_RHVRNALD, y = TPM_RHV)) +
  geom_point(color = "#A2A475", size = 3, alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#5A5156", linetype = "dashed", na.rm = TRUE) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  labs(x = "Log10 (Rhinovirus qPCR load)",
       y = "Rhinovirus Relative Abundance (TPM)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)),
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 15)),
        legend.position = "none") +
  annotate("text", x = max(data_plot$QPCR_RHVRNALD), y = max(data_plot$TPM_RHV), 
           label = paste0("Pearson's r = ", r, ", p ", p_value),
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = 5)
````

### Figure S4c
````{r, fig.width = 5, fig.height = 5, fig.align = 'center'}
ngs_RHV_positive_samples <- abundances_TPM %>%
  filter(TPM_RHV > 0) %>%
  pull(sample_ID)

pcr_RHV_positive_samples <- abundances_TPM %>%
  filter(PCR_ERRNA == 1) %>%
  pull(sample_ID)

data_plot <- abundances_TPM %>%
  mutate(detection = case_when(
    sample_ID %in% ngs_RHV_positive_samples & sample_ID %in% pcr_RHV_positive_samples ~ "PCR and NGS detected",
    (!sample_ID %in% ngs_RHV_positive_samples) & sample_ID %in% pcr_RHV_positive_samples ~ "PCR detected only",
  )) %>%
  filter(!is.na(detection)) %>%
  mutate(detection = factor(detection, levels = c("PCR and NGS detected", "PCR detected only")),
         QPCR_RHVRNALD = QPCR_RHVRNALD + 1)

counts <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(detection) %>%
  summarise(N = n_distinct(sample_ID))

x_labels <- setNames(paste0(levels(data_plot$detection), "\nN = ", counts$N), levels(data_plot$detection))

stat.test <- data_plot %>% 
  wilcox_test(QPCR_RHVRNALD ~ detection, paired = FALSE) %>%
  add_significance("p") %>%
  add_y_position() %>%
  mutate(y.position = log10(y.position + 1e9))

ggplot(data_plot, (aes(x=detection, y = QPCR_RHVRNALD))) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = detection, fill = detection), width = 0.5, alpha = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = detection), width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 2, alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wes_palette("Cavalcanti1")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = wes_palette("Cavalcanti1")) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Log10 (Rhinovirus qPCR load)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 15)),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test, label = "p.signif", hide.ns = TRUE, tip.length = 0)
````

## Figure S5
````{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 5, fig.align = 'center'}
rhino_prevalence <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(Final_Genus == "Enterovirus") %>%
  select("CONTIGS", all_of(samples), "Final_Species", "Final_RHV_strain") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") %>%
  group_by(Final_RHV_strain, sample_ID, Final_Species, .groups = "keep") %>%
  summarize(total_reads = sum(mapped_reads)) %>%
  mutate(detection_method = case_when(
    sample_ID %in% pcr_positive_samples & !(sample_ID %in% ngs_positive_samples) ~ "PCR detected only",
    sample_ID %in% ngs_positive_samples & !(sample_ID %in% pcr_positive_samples) ~ "NGS detected only",
    sample_ID %in% pcr_positive_samples & sample_ID %in% ngs_positive_samples ~ "PCR and NGS detected")) %>%
  filter(total_reads > 0)

data_plot <- rhino_prevalence %>%
  group_by(detection_method, Final_RHV_strain, Final_Species) %>%
  summarize(prevalence = sum(c_across(total_reads) > 0), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(detection_method) %>%
  mutate(total_prevalence = sum(prevalence),
         percentage = prevalence / total_prevalence * 100)

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = detection_method, y = percentage, fill = Final_RHV_strain)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = MyColorsRhino) +
  labs(
    y = "Prevalence of samples (%)",
    x = "",
    fill = "Rhinovirus strain"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()  
````

## Figure S6
````{r, fig.width = 12, fig.height = 6, fig.align = 'center'}
respi_patho_families <- c("Adenoviridae", "Coronaviridae", "Orthomyxoviridae", "Paramyxoviridae", "Picornaviridae", "Pneumoviridae", "Parvoviridae")

data_plot <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  select(c("CONTIGS", "length"), all_of(samples), all_of(grep("^Final", colnames(Mastertable_viral)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") %>%
  filter(Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses", Final_Family %in% respi_patho_families) %>%
  filter(!Final_Species == "Protoparvovirus primate3")
  
data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, Final_Species) %>%
  summarize(total_mapped_reads = sum(mapped_reads)) 

data_plot <- merge(data_plot, metadata, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

data_summary <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(Exa_or_stable, Final_Species) %>%
  summarize(prevalence_respi_patho = sum(total_mapped_reads > 0), 
            N_total = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(prevalence_respi_patho = ifelse(Exa_or_stable == "Stable_state",
                                         -prevalence_respi_patho,
                                         prevalence_respi_patho),
         prevalence_respi_patho_perc = prevalence_respi_patho / N_total)

data_summary$Final_Species <- factor(data_summary$Final_Species, levels = c("Human mastadenovirus B", "Betacoronavirus 1", "Human coronavirus HKU1", "Human coronavirus 229E", "Human coronavirus NL63", "Betainfluenzavirus influenzae", "Orthorubulavirus hominis", "Respirovirus pneumoniae", "Unclassified Bocaparvovirus", "Protoparvovirus primate3", "Rhinovirus A", "Rhinovirus B", "Rhinovirus C", "Metapneumovirus hominis", "Orthopneumovirus hominis", "Unclassified Orthopneumovirus"))

ggplot(data_summary, aes(x = prevalence_respi_patho_perc, y = Final_Species, fill = Final_Species)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = MyColorsRespiPathoSpecies) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = abs, limits = c(-0.1,0.1)) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev) +
  labs(y = "", x = "Prevalence in samples (%)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10)),
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.margin = margin(40, 0, 0, 0)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3) +
  annotate("text", x = -0.05, y = 16, label = "Stable state",
           vjust = -0.5, hjust = 0.5, size = 5) + 
  annotate("text", x = 0.05, y = 16, label = "Exacerbations",
           vjust = -0.5, hjust = 0.5, size = 5) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")
````

## Figure S7

### Figure S7a
````{r, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4, fig.align = 'center'}
abundances_TPM <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses") %>%
  select(c("CONTIGS", "length"), all_of(samples), all_of(grep("^Final", colnames(Mastertable_viral)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") 

abundances_TPM$RPK <- abundances_TPM$mapped_reads/abundances_TPM$length

abundances_TPM <- abundances_TPM %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  mutate(RPK_total = sum(RPK),
         TPM = (RPK / RPK_total) * 10^6)

abundances_TPM$TPM[is.nan(abundances_TPM$TPM)] <- 0

abundances_TPM <- abundances_TPM %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, Final_Species) %>%
  summarize(TPM_by_species = sum(TPM)) %>%
  summarize(observed_richness = sum(c_across(TPM_by_species) > 0), shannon_diversity = diversity(c_across(TPM_by_species), index = "shannon"))

abundances_TPM <- merge(abundances_TPM, metadata, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

data_plot <- abundances_TPM %>% 
  filter(CURRCOPD %in% c("Moderate", "Severe", "Very severe")) %>%
  mutate(CURRCOPD = factor(CURRCOPD, levels = c("Moderate", "Severe", "Very severe")))

counts <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(CURRCOPD) %>%
  summarise(N = n_distinct(sample_ID))

x_labels <- setNames(paste0(levels(data_plot$CURRCOPD), "\nN = ", counts$N), levels(data_plot$CURRCOPD))

stat.test <- data_plot %>% 
  wilcox_test(observed_richness ~ CURRCOPD, p.adjust.method = "holm") %>%
  add_xy_position(x = "CURRCOPD")

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = CURRCOPD, y = observed_richness)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = CURRCOPD, fill = CURRCOPD), width = 0.5, alpha = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = CURRCOPD), width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 1.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = MyColorsSeverity) +
  scale_color_manual(values = MyColorsSeverity) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 10, by = 2)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Observed Richness") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(linewidth = 1.2),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15, vjust = 2, margin = margin(r = 15)),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.position = "none") +
  stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test, label = "p.adj.signif", hide.ns = TRUE, tip.length = 0)
````

### Figure S7b
````{r, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4, fig.align = 'center'}
stat.test <- data_plot %>% 
  wilcox_test(shannon_diversity ~ CURRCOPD, p.adjust.method = "holm") %>%
  add_xy_position(x = "CURRCOPD")

ggplot(data_plot, aes(x = CURRCOPD, y = shannon_diversity)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = CURRCOPD, fill = CURRCOPD),  width = 0.5, alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = CURRCOPD), width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 1.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = MyColorsSeverity) +
  scale_color_manual(values = MyColorsSeverity) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Shannon Diversity Index") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(linewidth = 1.2),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15, vjust = 2, margin = margin(r = 15)),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.position = "none") +
  stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test, label = "p.adj.signif", hide.ns = TRUE, tip.length = 0)

````

## Figure S8

### Figure S8a
````{r, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 5, fig.align = 'center'}
samples_with_reads <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses" & Final_Family == "Anelloviridae") %>%
  select(all_of(samples)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), sum, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  select_if(~ . > 0) %>%
  colnames()

abundances_TPM_pos_only <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  select(c("CONTIGS", "length"), all_of(samples_with_reads), all_of(grep("^Final", colnames(Mastertable_viral)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples_with_reads, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") 

abundances_TPM_pos_only$RPK <- abundances_TPM_pos_only$mapped_reads/abundances_TPM_pos_only$length

data_plot <- abundances_TPM_pos_only %>%
  filter(Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses" & Final_Family == "Anelloviridae") %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, Final_GenusN) %>%
  summarize(RPK = sum(RPK), .groups = 'drop')

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  mutate(RPK_total = sum(RPK),
         TPM = (RPK / RPK_total) * 10^6)

data_plot <- merge(data_plot, metadata, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

data_summary <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(PID, Exa_or_stable, Final_GenusN) %>%
  summarize(mean_TPM_patient = mean(TPM), 
            n_per_PID = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Exa_or_stable, Final_GenusN) %>%
  summarize(mean = mean(mean_TPM_patient),
            N_samples = sum(n_per_PID),
            N_patients = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Final_GenusN) %>%
  filter(sum(mean) != 0)


data_summary <- data_summary %>%
  mutate(Exa_or_stable = factor(Exa_or_stable, levels = c("Stable_state", "Exacerbated_state")))

sample_size <- data_summary %>% 
  group_by(Exa_or_stable) %>% 
  summarise(N_samples = unique(N_samples), 
            N_patients = unique(N_patients), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(N = ifelse(Exa_or_stable == "Exacerbated_state",
                    paste0("Exacerbations\nN=", N_samples, "\n(", N_patients, " patients)"),
                    paste0("Stable state\nN=", N_samples, "\n(", N_patients, " patients)")))

x_labels <- setNames(sample_size$N, sample_size$Exa_or_stable)

ggplot(data = data_summary, aes(x = Exa_or_stable, y = mean, fill = Final_GenusN)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand=c(0,0)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Transcripts Per Kilobase Million (TPM)", fill = "Anelloviridae Genera")  +
  scale_fill_manual(values=MyColorsAnello, drop = TRUE) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 12))

data_summary <- data_plot %>%
  filter(CURRCOPD %in% c("Moderate", "Severe", "Very severe")) %>%
  group_by(PID, CURRCOPD, Final_GenusN) %>%
  summarize(mean_TPM_patient = mean(TPM),
            n_per_PID = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(CURRCOPD, Final_GenusN) %>%
  summarize(mean = mean(mean_TPM_patient),
            N_samples = sum(n_per_PID),
            N_patients = n(), .groups = "drop")

sample_size <- data_summary %>% 
  group_by(CURRCOPD) %>% 
  summarise(N_samples = unique(N_samples), 
            N_patients = unique(N_patients), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(N = paste0(CURRCOPD, "\nN=", N_samples, "\n(", N_patients, " patients)"))

data_summary <- data_summary %>%
  mutate(CURRCOPD = factor(CURRCOPD, levels = c("Moderate", "Severe", "Very severe")))
                           
ggplot(data = data_summary, aes(x = CURRCOPD, y = mean, fill = Final_GenusN)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  scale_y_continuous(expand=c(0,0)) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Transcripts Per Kilobase Million (TPM)", fill = "Anelloviridae Genera")  +
  scale_fill_manual(values=MyColorsAnello) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = setNames(sample_size$N, sample_size$CURRCOPD)) + 
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 12))


````

### Figure S8b
````{r,  fig.width = 15, fig.height = 3, fig.align = 'center'}
samples_with_reads <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses" & Final_Family == "Anelloviridae") %>%
  select(all_of(samples)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), sum, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  select_if(~ . > 0) %>%
  colnames()

abundances_TPM_pos_only <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  select(c("CONTIGS", "length"), all_of(samples_with_reads), all_of(grep("^Final", colnames(Mastertable_viral)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples_with_reads, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") 

abundances_TPM_pos_only$RPK <- abundances_TPM_pos_only$mapped_reads/abundances_TPM_pos_only$length

data_plot <- abundances_TPM_pos_only %>%
  filter(Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses" & Final_Family == "Anelloviridae") %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, Final_GenusN) %>%
  summarize(RPK = sum(RPK), .groups = 'drop')

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  mutate(RPK_total = sum(RPK),
         TPM = (RPK / RPK_total) * 10^6)

data_plot <- merge(data_plot, metadata, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

data_summary <- data_plot %>%
  mutate(Exa_or_stable = factor(Exa_or_stable, levels = c("Stable_state", "Exacerbated_state"),
                                labels = c("Stable state", "Exacerbations")))

counts <- data_summary %>%
  group_by(Exa_or_stable) %>%
  summarise(N = n_distinct(sample_ID))

x_labels <- setNames(paste0(levels(data_summary$Exa_or_stable), "\nN = ", counts$N), levels(data_summary$Exa_or_stable))

excl_stat <- data_summary %>%
  group_by(Final_GenusN, Exa_or_stable) %>%
  summarize(var = n_distinct(TPM), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Final_GenusN) %>%
  summarise(n_var = sum(var == 1), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(n_var >= 2) %>%
  pull(Final_GenusN)

stat.test <- data_summary %>% 
  filter(!Final_GenusN %in% excl_stat) %>%
  group_by(Final_GenusN) %>%
  wilcox_test(TPM ~ Exa_or_stable, p.adjust.method = "holm", paired = FALSE) %>%
  add_significance("p") %>%
  add_y_position() %>%
  mutate(y.position = y.position)

ggplot(data_summary, (aes(x=Exa_or_stable, y = TPM))) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = Final_GenusN, fill = Final_GenusN), width = 0.5, alpha = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Final_GenusN), width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 2, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = MyColorsAnello) +
  scale_color_manual(values = MyColorsAnello) +
  labs(x = "", y = "TPM") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 11),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        strip.text = element_text(margin = margin(b = 25, t = 10))) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  facet_wrap(~Final_GenusN, scales = "free_x", strip.position = "top", nrow = 1) +
  stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test, label = "p.signif", hide.ns = TRUE, tip.length = 0) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1000000), clip = "off")

data_summary <- data_plot %>%
  filter(CURRCOPD %in% c("Moderate", "Severe", "Very severe")) %>%
  mutate(CURRCOPD = factor(CURRCOPD, levels = c("Moderate", "Severe", "Very severe")))

counts <- data_summary %>%
  group_by(CURRCOPD) %>%
  summarise(N = n_distinct(sample_ID))

x_labels <- setNames(paste0(levels(data_summary$CURRCOPD), "\nN = ", counts$N), levels(data_summary$CURRCOPD))

excl_stat <- data_summary %>%
  group_by(Final_GenusN, CURRCOPD) %>%
  summarize(var = n_distinct(TPM), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Final_GenusN) %>%
  summarise(n_var = sum(var == 1), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(n_var >= 2) %>%
  pull(Final_GenusN)

stat.test <- data_summary %>% 
  filter(!Final_GenusN %in% excl_stat) %>%
  group_by(Final_GenusN) %>%
  wilcox_test(TPM ~ CURRCOPD, p.adjust.method = "holm", paired = FALSE) %>%
  add_y_position() %>%
  mutate(y.position = y.position)

ggplot(data_summary, (aes(x=CURRCOPD, y = TPM))) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(color = Final_GenusN, fill = Final_GenusN), width = 0.5, alpha = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Final_GenusN), width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 2, alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = MyColorsAnello) +
  scale_color_manual(values = MyColorsAnello) +
  labs(x = "", y = "TPM") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 11),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        strip.text = element_text(margin = margin(b = 45, t = 10))) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = x_labels) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  facet_wrap(~Final_GenusN, scales = "free_x", strip.position = "top", nrow = 1) +
  stat_pvalue_manual(stat.test, label = "p.adj.signif", hide.ns = TRUE, tip.length = 0) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1000000), clip = "off")


````

## Figure S9

### Figure S9a
````{r, fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4, fig.align = 'center'}
samples_with_reads <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  filter(!(Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses")) %>%
  select(all_of(samples)) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), sum, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  select_if(~ . > 0) %>%
  colnames()

abundances_TPM_pos_only <- Mastertable_viral %>%
  select(c("CONTIGS", "length"), all_of(samples_with_reads), all_of(grep("^Final", colnames(Mastertable_viral)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = samples_with_reads, names_to = "sample_ID", values_to = "mapped_reads") 

abundances_TPM_pos_only$RPK <- abundances_TPM_pos_only$mapped_reads/abundances_TPM_pos_only$length

data_plot <- abundances_TPM_pos_only %>%
  filter(!(Final_viral == "Eukaryotic viruses")) %>%
  group_by(sample_ID, Final_Class) %>%
  summarize(RPK = sum(RPK), .groups = 'drop')

data_plot <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(sample_ID) %>%
  mutate(RPK_total = sum(RPK),
         TPM = (RPK / RPK_total) * 10^6)

data_plot <- merge(data_plot, metadata, by.x = "sample_ID", by.y = "AERISVIR_Internal_ID", all = FALSE)

data_summary <- data_plot %>%
  group_by(PID, Exa_or_stable, Final_Class) %>%
  summarize(mean_TPM_patient = mean(TPM), 
            n_per_PID = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Exa_or_stable, Final_Class) %>%
  summarize(mean = mean(mean_TPM_patient),
            N_samples = sum(n_per_PID),
            N_patients = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Final_Class) %>%
  filter(sum(mean) != 0)


data_summary <- data_summary %>%
````
